src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:import { useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:import { Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle } from 'ogl';
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:import './LiquidChrome.css';
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:export const LiquidChrome = ({
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  baseColor = [0.1, 0.1, 0.1],
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  speed = 0.2,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  amplitude = 0.3,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  frequencyX = 3,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  frequencyY = 3,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  interactive = true,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  ...props
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:}) => {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef(null);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    if (!containerRef.current) return;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const container = containerRef.current;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const renderer = new Renderer({ antialias: true });
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const gl = renderer.gl;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    gl.clearColor(1, 1, 1, 1);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const vertexShader = `
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      attribute vec2 position;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      attribute vec2 uv;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      void main() {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        vUv = uv;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        gl_Position = vec4(position, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    `;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const fragmentShader = `
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      precision highp float;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uTime;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform vec3 uResolution;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform vec3 uBaseColor;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uAmplitude;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uFrequencyX;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uFrequencyY;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform vec2 uMouse;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      vec4 renderImage(vec2 uvCoord) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec2 fragCoord = uvCoord * uResolution.xy;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec2 uv = (2.0 * fragCoord - uResolution.xy) / min(uResolution.x, uResolution.y);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          for (float i = 1.0; i < 10.0; i++){
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              uv.x += uAmplitude / i * cos(i * uFrequencyX * uv.y + uTime + uMouse.x * 3.14159);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              uv.y += uAmplitude / i * cos(i * uFrequencyY * uv.x + uTime + uMouse.y * 3.14159);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec2 diff = (uvCoord - uMouse);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          float dist = length(diff);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          float falloff = exp(-dist * 20.0);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          float ripple = sin(10.0 * dist - uTime * 2.0) * 0.03;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          uv += (diff / (dist + 0.0001)) * ripple * falloff;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec3 color = uBaseColor / abs(sin(uTime - uv.y - uv.x));
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          return vec4(color, 1.0);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      void main() {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec4 col = vec4(0.0);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          int samples = 0;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          for (int i = -1; i <= 1; i++){
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              for (int j = -1; j <= 1; j++){
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:                  vec2 offset = vec2(float(i), float(j)) * (1.0 / min(uResolution.x, uResolution.y));
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:                  col += renderImage(vUv + offset);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:                  samples++;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          gl_FragColor = col / float(samples);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    `;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const geometry = new Triangle(gl);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const program = new Program(gl, {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      vertex: vertexShader,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      fragment: fragmentShader,
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniforms: {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uTime: { value: 0 },
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uResolution: {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          value: new Float32Array([gl.canvas.width, gl.canvas.height, gl.canvas.width / gl.canvas.height])
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        },
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uBaseColor: { value: new Float32Array(baseColor) },
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uAmplitude: { value: amplitude },
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uFrequencyX: { value: frequencyX },
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uFrequencyY: { value: frequencyY },
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uMouse: { value: new Float32Array([0, 0]) }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    });
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const mesh = new Mesh(gl, { geometry, program });
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    function resize() {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      const scale = 1;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      renderer.setSize(container.offsetWidth * scale, container.offsetHeight * scale);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      const resUniform = program.uniforms.uResolution.value;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      resUniform[0] = gl.canvas.width;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      resUniform[1] = gl.canvas.height;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      resUniform[2] = gl.canvas.width / gl.canvas.height;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    resize();
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    function handleMouseMove(event) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      const x = (event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      const y = 1 - (event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      const mouseUniform = program.uniforms.uMouse.value;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      mouseUniform[0] = x;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      mouseUniform[1] = y;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    function handleTouchMove(event) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      if (event.touches.length > 0) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        const touch = event.touches[0];
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        const x = (touch.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        const y = 1 - (touch.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        const mouseUniform = program.uniforms.uMouse.value;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        mouseUniform[0] = x;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        mouseUniform[1] = y;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    if (interactive) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      container.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    let animationId;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    function update(t) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      program.uniforms.uTime.value = t * 0.001 * speed;
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      renderer.render({ scene: mesh });
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    animationId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    container.appendChild(gl.canvas);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      if (interactive) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        container.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      if (gl.canvas.parentElement) {
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        gl.canvas.parentElement.removeChild(gl.canvas);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      gl.getExtension('WEBGL_lose_context')?.loseContext();
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    };
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  }, [baseColor, speed, amplitude, frequencyX, frequencyY, interactive]);
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:  return <div ref={containerRef} className="liquidChrome-container" {...props} />;

src/components/DotField.tsx:  glowRadius = 160,
src/components/DotField.tsx:  sparkle = false,

src/components/DotField.tsx:  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const glowRef = useRef<SVGCircleElement>(null);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const dotsRef = useRef<any[]>([]);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: -9999, y: -9999, prevX: -9999, prevY: -9999, speed: 0 });
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const sizeRef = useRef({ w: 0, h: 0, offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0 });
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const glowOpacity = useRef(0);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const engagement = useRef(0);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const propsRef = useRef<any>({});
src/components/DotField.tsx:  propsRef.current = { dotRadius, dotSpacing, cursorRadius, cursorForce, bulgeOnly, bulgeStrength, sparkle, waveAmplitude, gradientFrom, gradientTo };
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const rebuildRef = useRef<any>(null);
src/components/DotField.tsx:  const glowIdRef = useRef(`dot-field-glow-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9)}`);
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/DotField.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    const glowEl = glowRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { alpha: true });
src/components/DotField.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    const dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
src/components/DotField.tsx:    let resizeTimer: any;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    function resize() {
src/components/DotField.tsx:      clearTimeout(resizeTimer);

src/components/DotField.tsx:    }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    function doResize() {

src/components/DotField.tsx:      const rect = canvas.parentElement?.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/DotField.tsx:      if (!rect) return;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const w = rect.width;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const h = rect.height;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      canvas.width = w * dpr;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      canvas.height = h * dpr;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      canvas.style.width = `${w}px`;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      canvas.style.height = `${h}px`;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      ctx?.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      sizeRef.current = {
src/components/DotField.tsx:        w,

src/components/DotField.tsx:        offsetY: rect.top + window.scrollY,

src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    function buildDots(w: number, h: number) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const p = propsRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const step = p.dotRadius + p.dotSpacing;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const cols = Math.floor(w / step);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const rows = Math.floor(h / step);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const padX = (w % step) / 2;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const padY = (h % step) / 2;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const dots = new Array(rows * cols);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      let idx = 0;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      for (let row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:        for (let col = 0; col < cols; col++) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          const ax = padX + col * step + step / 2;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          const ay = padY + row * step + step / 2;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          dots[idx++] = { ax, ay, sx: ax, sy: ay, vx: 0, vy: 0, x: ax, y: ay };
src/components/DotField.tsx:        }
src/components/DotField.tsx:      }
src/components/DotField.tsx:      dotsRef.current = dots;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    function onMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {

src/components/DotField.tsx:      mouseRef.current.x = e.pageX - s.offsetX;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      mouseRef.current.y = e.pageY - s.offsetY;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    function updateMouseSpeed() {
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const m = mouseRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const dx = m.prevX - m.x;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const dy = m.prevY - m.y;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      m.speed += (dist - m.speed) * 0.5;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      if (m.speed < 0.001) m.speed = 0;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      m.prevX = m.x;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      m.prevY = m.y;
src/components/DotField.tsx:    }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    const speedInterval = setInterval(updateMouseSpeed, 20);
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    let frameCount = 0;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    function tick() {
src/components/DotField.tsx:      frameCount++;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const dots = dotsRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const m = mouseRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const { w, h } = sizeRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const p = propsRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const len = dots.length;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const t = frameCount * 0.02;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const targetEngagement = Math.min(m.speed / 5, 1);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      engagement.current += (targetEngagement - engagement.current) * 0.06;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      if (engagement.current < 0.001) engagement.current = 0;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const eng = engagement.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      glowOpacity.current += (eng - glowOpacity.current) * 0.08;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      if (glowEl) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:        glowEl.setAttribute('cx', m.x.toString());
src/components/DotField.tsx:        glowEl.setAttribute('cy', m.y.toString());
src/components/DotField.tsx:        glowEl.style.opacity = glowOpacity.current.toString();
src/components/DotField.tsx:      }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      ctx!.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const grad = ctx!.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      grad.addColorStop(0, p.gradientFrom);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      grad.addColorStop(1, p.gradientTo);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      ctx!.fillStyle = grad;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const cr = p.cursorRadius;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const crSq = cr * cr;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const rad = p.dotRadius / 2;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const isBulge = p.bulgeOnly;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      ctx!.beginPath();
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:        const d = dots[i];
src/components/DotField.tsx:        const dx = m.x - d.ax;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        const dy = m.y - d.ay;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        const distSq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:        if (distSq < crSq && eng > 0.01) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
src/components/DotField.tsx:          if (isBulge) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:            const t = 1 - dist / cr;
src/components/DotField.tsx:            const push = t * t * p.bulgeStrength * eng;
src/components/DotField.tsx:            const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
src/components/DotField.tsx:            d.sx += (d.ax - Math.cos(angle) * push - d.sx) * 0.15;
src/components/DotField.tsx:            d.sy += (d.ay - Math.sin(angle) * push - d.sy) * 0.15;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          } else {
src/components/DotField.tsx:            const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
src/components/DotField.tsx:            const move = (500 / dist) * (m.speed * p.cursorForce);
src/components/DotField.tsx:            d.vx += Math.cos(angle) * -move;
src/components/DotField.tsx:            d.vy += Math.sin(angle) * -move;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          }
src/components/DotField.tsx:        } else if (isBulge) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.sx += (d.ax - d.sx) * 0.1;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.sy += (d.ay - d.sy) * 0.1;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:        if (!isBulge) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.vx *= 0.9;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.vy *= 0.9;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.x = d.ax + d.vx;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.y = d.ay + d.vy;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.sx += (d.x - d.sx) * 0.1;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          d.sy += (d.y - d.sy) * 0.1;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:        let drawX = d.sx;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        let drawY = d.sy;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        if (p.waveAmplitude > 0) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          drawY += Math.sin(d.ax * 0.03 + t) * p.waveAmplitude;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          drawX += Math.cos(d.ay * 0.03 + t * 0.7) * p.waveAmplitude * 0.5;
src/components/DotField.tsx:        }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:        if (p.sparkle) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          const hash = ((i * 2654435761) ^ (frameCount >> 3)) >>> 0;
src/components/DotField.tsx:          if ((hash % 100) < 3) {
src/components/DotField.tsx:            ctx!.moveTo(drawX + rad * 1.8, drawY);
src/components/DotField.tsx:            ctx!.arc(drawX, drawY, rad * 1.8, 0, TWO_PI);
src/components/DotField.tsx:          } else {
src/components/DotField.tsx:            ctx!.moveTo(drawX + rad, drawY);
src/components/DotField.tsx:            ctx!.arc(drawX, drawY, rad, 0, TWO_PI);
src/components/DotField.tsx:          }
src/components/DotField.tsx:        } else {
src/components/DotField.tsx:          ctx!.moveTo(drawX + rad, drawY);
src/components/DotField.tsx:          ctx!.arc(drawX, drawY, rad, 0, TWO_PI);
src/components/DotField.tsx:        }
src/components/DotField.tsx:      }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      ctx!.fill();
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:      rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
src/components/DotField.tsx:    }
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    doResize();
src/components/DotField.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/DotField.tsx:    window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove, { passive: true });
src/components/DotField.tsx:    rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    rebuildRef.current = () => {
src/components/DotField.tsx:      const { w, h } = sizeRef.current;
src/components/DotField.tsx:      if (w > 0 && h > 0) buildDots(w, h);
src/components/DotField.tsx:    };
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/DotField.tsx:      if (rafRef.current) cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      clearInterval(speedInterval);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/DotField.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
src/components/DotField.tsx:    };
src/components/DotField.tsx:  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
src/components/DotField.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/DotField.tsx:
src/components/DotField.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/DotField.tsx:    rebuildRef.current?.();
src/components/DotField.tsx:  }, [dotRadius, dotSpacing]);
src/components/DotField.tsx:

src/components/Aurora.tsx:import { Renderer, Program, Mesh, Color, Triangle } from 'ogl';
src/components/Aurora.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:import './Aurora.css';
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:const VERT = `#version 300 es
src/components/Aurora.tsx:in vec2 position;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
src/components/Aurora.tsx:`;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:const FRAG = `#version 300 es
src/components/Aurora.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform float uAmplitude;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform vec3 uColorStops[3];
src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform vec2 uResolution;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform float uBlend;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:out vec4 fragColor;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:vec3 permute(vec3 x) {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  return mod(((x * 34.0) + 1.0) * x, 289.0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:float snoise(vec2 v){
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  const vec4 C = vec4(
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      0.211324865405187, 0.366025403784439,
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      -0.577350269189626, 0.024390243902439
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  );
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 i  = floor(v + dot(v, C.yy));
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 x0 = v - i + dot(i, C.xx);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 i1 = (x0.x > x0.y) ? vec2(1.0, 0.0) : vec2(0.0, 1.0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec4 x12 = x0.xyxy + C.xxzz;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  x12.xy -= i1;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  i = mod(i, 289.0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 p = permute(
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      permute(i.y + vec3(0.0, i1.y, 1.0))
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    + i.x + vec3(0.0, i1.x, 1.0)
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  );
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 m = max(
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      0.5 - vec3(
src/components/Aurora.tsx:          dot(x0, x0),
src/components/Aurora.tsx:          dot(x12.xy, x12.xy),
src/components/Aurora.tsx:          dot(x12.zw, x12.zw)
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      ), 
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      0.0
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  );
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  m = m * m;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  m = m * m;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 x = 2.0 * fract(p * C.www) - 1.0;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 h = abs(x) - 0.5;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 ox = floor(x + 0.5);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 a0 = x - ox;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  m *= 1.79284291400159 - 0.85373472095314 * (a0*a0 + h*h);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 g;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  g.x  = a0.x  * x0.x  + h.x  * x0.y;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  g.yz = a0.yz * x12.xz + h.yz * x12.yw;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  return 130.0 * dot(m, g);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:struct ColorStop {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 color;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float position;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:};
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:#define COLOR_RAMP(colors, factor, finalColor) {              \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  int index = 0;                                            \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {                               \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:     ColorStop currentColor = colors[i];                    \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:     bool isInBetween = currentColor.position <= factor;    \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:     index = int(mix(float(index), float(i), float(isInBetween))); \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  }                                                         \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  ColorStop currentColor = colors[index];                   \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  ColorStop nextColor = colors[index + 1];                  \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float range = nextColor.position - currentColor.position; \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float lerpFactor = (factor - currentColor.position) / range; \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  finalColor = mix(currentColor.color, nextColor.color, lerpFactor); \\
src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 uv = gl_FragCoord.xy / uResolution;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  ColorStop colors[3];
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  colors[0] = ColorStop(uColorStops[0], 0.0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  colors[1] = ColorStop(uColorStops[1], 0.5);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  colors[2] = ColorStop(uColorStops[2], 1.0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 rampColor;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  COLOR_RAMP(colors, uv.x, rampColor);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float height = snoise(vec2(uv.x * 2.0 + uTime * 0.1, uTime * 0.25)) * 0.5 * uAmplitude;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  height = exp(height);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  height = (uv.y * 2.0 - height + 0.2);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float intensity = 0.6 * height;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float midPoint = 0.20;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float auroraAlpha = smoothstep(midPoint - uBlend * 0.5, midPoint + uBlend * 0.5, intensity);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 auroraColor = intensity * rampColor;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  fragColor = vec4(auroraColor * auroraAlpha, auroraAlpha);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
src/components/Aurora.tsx:`;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:interface AuroraProps {

src/components/Aurora.tsx:  amplitude?: number;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  blend?: number;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  time?: number;

src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:export default function Aurora(props: AuroraProps) {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  const { colorStops = ['#5227FF', '#7cff67', '#5227FF'], amplitude = 1.0, blend = 0.5 } = props;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  const propsRef = useRef(props);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  propsRef.current = props;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  const ctnDom = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const ctn = ctnDom.current;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    if (!ctn) return;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const renderer = new Renderer({
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      alpha: true,
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      premultipliedAlpha: true,
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      antialias: true
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    });
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const gl = renderer.gl;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    gl.clearColor(0, 0, 0, 0);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    gl.enable(gl.BLEND);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    gl.blendFunc(gl.ONE, gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    gl.canvas.style.backgroundColor = 'transparent';
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    let program: Program;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    function resize() {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      if (!ctn) return;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      const width = ctn.offsetWidth;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      const height = ctn.offsetHeight;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      renderer.setSize(width, height);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      if (program) {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        program.uniforms.uResolution.value = [width, height];
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      }
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    }
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const geometry = new Triangle(gl);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    if (geometry.attributes.uv) {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      delete geometry.attributes.uv;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    }
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const colorStopsArray = colorStops.map(hex => {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      const c = new Color(hex);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      return [c.r, c.g, c.b];
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    });
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    program = new Program(gl, {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      vertex: VERT,
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      fragment: FRAG,
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      uniforms: {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        uTime: { value: 0 },
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        uAmplitude: { value: amplitude },
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        uColorStops: { value: colorStopsArray },
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        uResolution: { value: [ctn.offsetWidth, ctn.offsetHeight] },
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        uBlend: { value: blend }
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      }
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    });
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const mesh = new Mesh(gl, { geometry, program });
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    ctn.appendChild(gl.canvas);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    let animateId = 0;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    const update = (t: number) => {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      animateId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      const { time = t * 0.01, speed = 1.0 } = propsRef.current;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      program.uniforms.uTime.value = time * speed * 0.1;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      program.uniforms.uAmplitude.value = propsRef.current.amplitude ?? 1.0;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      program.uniforms.uBlend.value = propsRef.current.blend ?? blend;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      const stops = propsRef.current.colorStops ?? colorStops;
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      program.uniforms.uColorStops.value = stops.map((hex: string) => {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        const c = new Color(hex);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        return [c.r, c.g, c.b];
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      });
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      renderer.render({ scene: mesh });
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    };
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    animateId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    resize();
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animateId);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      if (ctn && gl.canvas.parentNode === ctn) {
src/components/Aurora.tsx:        ctn.removeChild(gl.canvas);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      }
src/components/Aurora.tsx:      gl.getExtension('WEBGL_lose_context')?.loseContext();
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    };
src/components/Aurora.tsx:    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  }, [amplitude]);
src/components/Aurora.tsx:
src/components/Aurora.tsx:  return <div ref={ctnDom} className="aurora-container" />;

src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:export default function ProQuotaModal({ isOpen, onClose }: ProQuotaModalProps) {
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  const { t } = useLanguage();
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  const [usage, setUsage] = useState('opt1');
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  const [isSuccess, setIsSuccess] = useState(false);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  // Reset state when modal opens
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    if (isOpen) {
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      setEmail('');
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      setUsage('opt1');
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      setIsSubmitting(false);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      setIsSuccess(false);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    }
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  }, [isOpen]);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    if (!email) return;
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    setIsSubmitting(true);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    // Fake loading for 1.5s
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    setTimeout(() => {
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      setIsSubmitting(false);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      setIsSuccess(true);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    }, 1500);
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  };
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:  return (
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:    <AnimatePresence>
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:      {isOpen && (
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 sm:p-6">
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:          {/* Backdrop */}
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:          <motion.div
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:            onClick={onClose}
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:            className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md"
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:          />
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:          {/* Modal Content */}
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:          <motion.div
src/components/ProQuotaModal.tsx:            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}

src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:function hexToVec3(hex: string) {

src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return [
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255

src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:const vertexShader = `
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:attribute vec2 uv;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:attribute vec2 position;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:void main() {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vUv = uv;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 0, 1);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:`;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:const fragmentShader = `
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform vec3 uResolution;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uScale;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uBrightness;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor1;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor2;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uNoiseFreq;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uNoiseAmp;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uBandHeight;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uBandSpread;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uOctaveDecay;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uLayerOffset;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uColorSpeed;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform vec2 uMouse;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform float uMouseInfluence;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:uniform bool uEnableMouse;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:#define TAU 6.28318
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:vec3 gradientHash(vec3 p) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  p = vec3(
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    dot(p, vec3(127.1, 311.7, 234.6)),
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    dot(p, vec3(269.5, 183.3, 198.3)),
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    dot(p, vec3(169.5, 283.3, 156.9))
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  );
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 h = fract(sin(p) * 43758.5453123);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float phi = acos(2.0 * h.x - 1.0);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float theta = TAU * h.y;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return vec3(cos(theta) * sin(phi), sin(theta) * cos(phi), cos(phi));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:float quinticSmooth(float t) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float t2 = t * t;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float t3 = t * t2;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return 6.0 * t3 * t2 - 15.0 * t2 * t2 + 10.0 * t3;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:vec3 cosineGradient(float t, vec3 a, vec3 b, vec3 c, vec3 d) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return a + b * cos(TAU * (c * t + d));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:float perlin3D(float amplitude, float frequency, float px, float py, float pz) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float x = px * frequency;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float y = py * frequency;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float fx = floor(x); float fy = floor(y); float fz = floor(pz);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float cx = ceil(x);  float cy = ceil(y);  float cz = ceil(pz);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g000 = gradientHash(vec3(fx, fy, fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g100 = gradientHash(vec3(cx, fy, fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g010 = gradientHash(vec3(fx, cy, fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g110 = gradientHash(vec3(cx, cy, fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g001 = gradientHash(vec3(fx, fy, cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g101 = gradientHash(vec3(cx, fy, cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g011 = gradientHash(vec3(fx, cy, cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g111 = gradientHash(vec3(cx, cy, cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d000 = dot(g000, vec3(x - fx, y - fy, pz - fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d100 = dot(g100, vec3(x - cx, y - fy, pz - fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d010 = dot(g010, vec3(x - fx, y - cy, pz - fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d110 = dot(g110, vec3(x - cx, y - cy, pz - fz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d001 = dot(g001, vec3(x - fx, y - fy, pz - cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d101 = dot(g101, vec3(x - cx, y - fy, pz - cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d011 = dot(g011, vec3(x - fx, y - cy, pz - cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float d111 = dot(g111, vec3(x - cx, y - cy, pz - cz));
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float sx = quinticSmooth(x - fx);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float sy = quinticSmooth(y - fy);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float sz = quinticSmooth(pz - fz);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float lx00 = mix(d000, d100, sx);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float lx10 = mix(d010, d110, sx);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float lx01 = mix(d001, d101, sx);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float lx11 = mix(d011, d111, sx);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float ly0 = mix(lx00, lx10, sy);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float ly1 = mix(lx01, lx11, sy);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return amplitude * mix(ly0, ly1, sz);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:float auroraGlow(float t, vec2 shift) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec2 uv = gl_FragCoord.xy / uResolution.y;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  uv += shift;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float noiseVal = 0.0;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float freq = uNoiseFreq;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float amp = uNoiseAmp;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec2 samplePos = uv * uScale;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  for (float i = 0.0; i < 3.0; i += 1.0) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    noiseVal += perlin3D(amp, freq, samplePos.x, samplePos.y, t);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    amp *= uOctaveDecay;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    freq *= 2.0;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  }
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float yBand = uv.y * 10.0 - uBandHeight * 10.0;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return 0.3 * max(exp(uBandSpread * (1.0 - 1.1 * abs(noiseVal + yBand))), 0.0);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:void main() {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec2 uv = gl_FragCoord.xy / uResolution.xy;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float t = uSpeed * 0.4 * uTime;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec2 shift = vec2(0.0);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  if (uEnableMouse) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    shift = (uMouse - 0.5) * uMouseInfluence;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  }
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  col += 0.99 * auroraGlow(t, shift) * cosineGradient(uv.x + uTime * uSpeed * 0.2 * uColorSpeed, vec3(0.5), vec3(0.5), vec3(1.0), vec3(0.3, 0.20, 0.20)) * uColor1;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  col += 0.99 * auroraGlow(t + uLayerOffset, shift) * cosineGradient(uv.x + uTime * uSpeed * 0.1 * uColorSpeed, vec3(0.5), vec3(0.5), vec3(2.0, 1.0, 0.0), vec3(0.5, 0.20, 0.25)) * uColor2;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  col *= uBrightness;
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float alpha = clamp(length(col), 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(col, alpha);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:`;

src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  scale = 1.5,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  brightness = 1.0,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  color1 = '#f7f7f7',
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  color2 = '#e100ff',
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  noiseFrequency = 2.5,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  noiseAmplitude = 1.0,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  bandHeight = 0.5,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  bandSpread = 1.0,

src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  colorSpeed = 1.0,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  enableMouseInteraction = true,
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  mouseInfluence = 0.25
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}: SoftAuroraProps) {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    if (!containerRef.current) return;

src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:const vert = `
src/components/GridScan.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:void main(){
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  vUv = uv;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position.xy, 0.0, 1.0);

src/components/GridScan.tsx:`;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:const frag = `
src/components/GridScan.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform vec3 iResolution;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float iTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform vec2 uSkew;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uTilt;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uYaw;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uLineThickness;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform vec3 uLinesColor;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform vec3 uScanColor;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uGridScale;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uLineStyle;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uLineJitter;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanOpacity;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanDirection;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uNoise;

src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanGlow;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanSoftness;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uPhaseTaper;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanDuration;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanDelay;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanStarts[8];
src/components/GridScan.tsx:uniform float uScanCount;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:const int MAX_SCANS = 8;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:float smoother01(float a, float b, float x){
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float t = clamp((x - a) / max(1e-5, (b - a)), 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return t * t * t * (t * (t * 6.0 - 15.0) + 10.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:void mainImage(out vec4 fragColor, in vec2 fragCoord)
src/components/GridScan.tsx:{
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec2 p = (2.0 * fragCoord - iResolution.xy) / iResolution.y;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec3 ro = vec3(0.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec3 rd = normalize(vec3(p, 2.0));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float cR = cos(uTilt), sR = sin(uTilt);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    rd.xy = mat2(cR, -sR, sR, cR) * rd.xy;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float cY = cos(uYaw), sY = sin(uYaw);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    rd.xz = mat2(cY, -sY, sY, cY) * rd.xz;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec2 skew = clamp(uSkew, vec2(-0.7), vec2(0.7));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    rd.xy += skew * rd.z;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec3 color = vec3(0.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float minT = 1e20;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float gridScale = max(1e-5, uGridScale);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float fadeStrength = 2.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec2 gridUV = vec2(0.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float hitIsY = 1.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        float isY = float(i < 2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        float pos = mix(-0.2, 0.2, float(i)) * isY + mix(-0.5, 0.5, float(i - 2)) * (1.0 - isY);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        float num = pos - (isY * ro.y + (1.0 - isY) * ro.x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        float den = isY * rd.y + (1.0 - isY) * rd.x;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        float t = num / den;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        vec3 h = ro + rd * t;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        float depthBoost = smoothstep(0.0, 3.0, h.z);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        h.xy += skew * 0.15 * depthBoost;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    bool use = t > 0.0 && t < minT;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    gridUV = use ? mix(h.zy, h.xz, isY) / gridScale : gridUV;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    minT = use ? t : minT;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    hitIsY = use ? isY : hitIsY;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec3 hit = ro + rd * minT;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dist = length(hit - ro);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float jitterAmt = clamp(uLineJitter, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (jitterAmt > 0.0) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    vec2 j = vec2(
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      sin(gridUV.y * 2.7 + iTime * 1.8),
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      cos(gridUV.x * 2.3 - iTime * 1.6)
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    ) * (0.15 * jitterAmt);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    gridUV += j;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float fx = fract(gridUV.x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float fy = fract(gridUV.y);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float ax = min(fx, 1.0 - fx);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float ay = min(fy, 1.0 - fy);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float wx = fwidth(gridUV.x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float wy = fwidth(gridUV.y);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float halfPx = max(0.0, uLineThickness) * 0.5;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float tx = halfPx * wx;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float ty = halfPx * wy;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float aax = wx;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float aay = wy;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float lineX = 1.0 - smoothstep(tx, tx + aax, ax);

src/components/GridScan.tsx:    if (uLineStyle < 1.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      lineX *= dashMaskY;

src/components/GridScan.tsx:

src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (jitterAmt > 0.0) {

src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float fx2 = fract(gridUV2.x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float fy2 = fract(gridUV2.y);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float ax2 = min(fx2, 1.0 - fx2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float ay2 = min(fy2, 1.0 - fy2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float wx2 = fwidth(gridUV2.x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float wy2 = fwidth(gridUV2.y);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float tx2 = halfPx * wx2;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float ty2 = halfPx * wy2;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float aax2 = wx2;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float aay2 = wy2;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float lineX2 = 1.0 - smoothstep(tx2, tx2 + aax2, ax2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float lineY2 = 1.0 - smoothstep(ty2, ty2 + aay2, ay2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (uLineStyle > 0.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dashRepeat2 = 4.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dashDuty2 = 0.5;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float vy2m = fract(gridUV2.y * dashRepeat2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float vx2m = fract(gridUV2.x * dashRepeat2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dashMaskY2 = step(vy2m, dashDuty2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dashMaskX2 = step(vx2m, dashDuty2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    if (uLineStyle < 1.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      lineX2 *= dashMaskY2;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      lineY2 *= dashMaskX2;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    } else {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float dotRepeat2 = 6.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float dotWidth2 = 0.18;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float cy2 = abs(fract(gridUV2.y * dotRepeat2) - 0.5);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float cx2 = abs(fract(gridUV2.x * dotRepeat2) - 0.5);

src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float edgeDistX = min(abs(hit.x - (-0.5)), abs(hit.x - 0.5));

src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  float lineMask = max(primaryMask, altMask);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float fade = exp(-dist * fadeStrength);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dur = max(0.05, uScanDuration);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float del = max(0.0, uScanDelay);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float scanZMax = 2.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float widthScale = max(0.1, uScanGlow);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float sigma = max(0.001, 0.18 * widthScale * uScanSoftness);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float sigmaA = sigma * 2.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float combinedPulse = 0.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float combinedAura = 0.0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float cycle = dur + del;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float tCycle = mod(iTime, cycle);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float scanPhase = clamp((tCycle - del) / dur, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float phase = scanPhase;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    if (uScanDirection > 0.5 && uScanDirection < 1.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      phase = 1.0 - phase;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    } else if (uScanDirection > 1.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float t2 = mod(max(0.0, iTime - del), 2.0 * dur);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      phase = (t2 < dur) ? (t2 / dur) : (1.0 - (t2 - dur) / dur);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float scanZ = phase * scanZMax;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float dz = abs(hit.z - scanZ);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float lineBand = exp(-0.5 * (dz * dz) / (sigma * sigma));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float taper = clamp(uPhaseTaper, 0.0, 0.49);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float headW = taper;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float tailW = taper;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float headFade = smoother01(0.0, headW, phase);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float tailFade = 1.0 - smoother01(1.0 - tailW, 1.0, phase);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float phaseWindow = headFade * tailFade;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float pulseBase = lineBand * phaseWindow;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    combinedPulse += pulseBase * clamp(uScanOpacity, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float auraBand = exp(-0.5 * (dz * dz) / (sigmaA * sigmaA));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    combinedAura += (auraBand * 0.25) * phaseWindow * clamp(uScanOpacity, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    for (int i = 0; i < MAX_SCANS; i++) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      if (float(i) >= uScanCount) break;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float tActiveI = iTime - uScanStarts[i];
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float phaseI = clamp(tActiveI / dur, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      if (uScanDirection > 0.5 && uScanDirection < 1.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        phaseI = 1.0 - phaseI;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      } else if (uScanDirection > 1.5) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        phaseI = (phaseI < 0.5) ? (phaseI * 2.0) : (1.0 - (phaseI - 0.5) * 2.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float scanZI = phaseI * scanZMax;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float dzI = abs(hit.z - scanZI);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float lineBandI = exp(-0.5 * (dzI * dzI) / (sigma * sigma));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float headFadeI = smoother01(0.0, headW, phaseI);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float tailFadeI = 1.0 - smoother01(1.0 - tailW, 1.0, phaseI);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float phaseWindowI = headFadeI * tailFadeI;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      combinedPulse += lineBandI * phaseWindowI * clamp(uScanOpacity, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      float auraBandI = exp(-0.5 * (dzI * dzI) / (sigmaA * sigmaA));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      combinedAura += (auraBandI * 0.25) * phaseWindowI * clamp(uScanOpacity, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:

src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    const start = async () => {

src/components/GridScan.tsx:      const opts = new faceapi.TinyFaceDetectorOptions({ inputSize: 320, scoreThreshold: 0.5 });
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      const detect = async (ts: number) => {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        if (stop) return;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        if (ts - lastDetect >= 33) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          lastDetect = ts;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          try {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:            const res = await faceapi.detectSingleFace(video, opts).withFaceLandmarks(true);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:            if (res && res.detection) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const det = res.detection;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const box = det.box;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const vw = video.videoWidth || 1;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const vh = video.videoHeight || 1;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const cx = box.x + box.width * 0.5;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const cy = box.y + box.height * 0.5;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const nx = (cx / vw) * 2 - 1;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const ny = (cy / vh) * 2 - 1;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              medianPush(bufX.current, nx, 5);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              medianPush(bufY.current, ny, 5);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const nxm = median(bufX.current);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const nym = median(bufY.current);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const look = new THREE.Vector2(Math.tanh(nxm), Math.tanh(nym));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const faceSize = Math.min(1, Math.hypot(box.width / vw, box.height / vh));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const depthScale = 1 + depthResponse * (faceSize - 0.25);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              lookTarget.current.copy(look.multiplyScalar(depthScale));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const leftEye = res.landmarks.getLeftEye();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const rightEye = res.landmarks.getRightEye();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const lc = centroid(leftEye);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const rc = centroid(rightEye);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const tilt = Math.atan2(rc.y - lc.y, rc.x - lc.x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              medianPush(bufT.current, tilt, 5);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              tiltTarget.current = median(bufT.current);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const nose = res.landmarks.getNose();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const tip = nose[nose.length - 1] || nose[Math.floor(nose.length / 2)];
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const jaw = res.landmarks.getJawOutline();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const leftCheek = jaw[3] || jaw[2];
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const rightCheek = jaw[13] || jaw[14];
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const dL = dist2(tip, leftCheek);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const dR = dist2(tip, rightCheek);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              const eyeDist = Math.hypot(rc.x - lc.x, rc.y - lc.y) + 1e-6;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              let yawSignal = THREE.MathUtils.clamp((dR - dL) / (eyeDist * 1.6), -1, 1);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              yawSignal = Math.tanh(yawSignal);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              medianPush(bufYaw.current, yawSignal, 5);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              yawTarget.current = median(bufYaw.current);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              setUiFaceActive(true);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:            } else {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:              setUiFaceActive(false);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:            }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          } catch {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:            setUiFaceActive(false);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        if ('requestVideoFrameCallback' in HTMLVideoElement.prototype) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          (video as any).requestVideoFrameCallback(() => detect(performance.now()));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        } else {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          requestAnimationFrame(detect);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      };
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      requestAnimationFrame(detect);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    };
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    start();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      stop = true;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      if (video) {

src/components/GridScan.tsx:        video.srcObject = null;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:      }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    };
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }, [enableWebcam, modelsReady, depthResponse]);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return (

src/components/GridScan.tsx:      {showPreview && (
src/components/GridScan.tsx:        <div className="gridscan__preview">
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          <video ref={videoRef} muted playsInline autoPlay className="gridscan__video" />
src/components/GridScan.tsx:          <div className="gridscan__badge">

src/components/GridScan.tsx:function srgbColor(hex: string) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const c = new THREE.Color(hex);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return c.convertSRGBToLinear();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:function smoothDampVec2(current: any, target: any, currentVelocity: any, smoothTime: any, maxSpeed: any, deltaTime: any) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const out = current.clone();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  smoothTime = Math.max(0.0001, smoothTime);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const omega = 2 / smoothTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const x = omega * deltaTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const exp = 1 / (1 + x + 0.48 * x * x + 0.235 * x * x * x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let change = current.clone().sub(target);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const originalTo = target.clone();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const maxChange = maxSpeed * smoothTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (change.length() > maxChange) change.setLength(maxChange);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  target = current.clone().sub(change);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const temp = currentVelocity.clone().addScaledVector(change, omega).multiplyScalar(deltaTime);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  currentVelocity.sub(temp.clone().multiplyScalar(omega));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  currentVelocity.multiplyScalar(exp);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  out.copy(target.clone().add(change.add(temp).multiplyScalar(exp)));
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const origMinusCurrent = originalTo.clone().sub(current);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const outMinusOrig = out.clone().sub(originalTo);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (origMinusCurrent.dot(outMinusOrig) > 0) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    out.copy(originalTo);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    currentVelocity.set(0, 0);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return out;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:function smoothDampFloat(current: any, target: any, velRef: any, smoothTime: any, maxSpeed: any, deltaTime: any) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  smoothTime = Math.max(0.0001, smoothTime);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const omega = 2 / smoothTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const x = omega * deltaTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const exp = 1 / (1 + x + 0.48 * x * x + 0.235 * x * x * x);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let change = current - target;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const originalTo = target;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const maxChange = maxSpeed * smoothTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  change = Math.sign(change) * Math.min(Math.abs(change), maxChange);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  target = current - change;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const temp = (velRef.v + omega * change) * deltaTime;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  velRef.v = (velRef.v - omega * temp) * exp;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let out = target + (change + temp) * exp;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const origMinusCurrent = originalTo - current;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const outMinusOrig = out - originalTo;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (origMinusCurrent * outMinusOrig > 0) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    out = originalTo;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    velRef.v = 0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return { value: out, v: velRef.v };
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:function medianPush(buf: any[], v: any, maxLen: number) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  buf.push(v);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (buf.length > maxLen) buf.shift();
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:function median(buf: any[]) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (buf.length === 0) return 0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const a = [...buf].sort((x, y) => x - y);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const mid = Math.floor(a.length / 2);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return a.length % 2 ? a[mid] : (a[mid - 1] + a[mid]) * 0.5;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:function centroid(points: any[]) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let x = 0,
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    y = 0;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const n = points.length || 1;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  for (const p of points) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    x += p.x;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:    y += p.y;
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return { x: x / n, y: y / n };
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
src/components/GridScan.tsx:
src/components/GridScan.tsx:function dist2(a: any, b: any) {
src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.y - b.y);
src/components/GridScan.tsx:}

src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:const vertexShader = `
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:attribute vec2 uv;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:attribute vec2 position;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vUv = uv;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 0, 1);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:`;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:const fragmentShader = `
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform vec3 uResolution;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform vec2 uFocal;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform vec2 uRotation;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uStarSpeed;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uDensity;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uHueShift;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform vec2 uMouse;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uGlowIntensity;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uSaturation;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform bool uMouseRepulsion;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uTwinkleIntensity;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uRotationSpeed;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uRepulsionStrength;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uMouseActiveFactor;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform float uAutoCenterRepulsion;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:uniform bool uTransparent;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:#define NUM_LAYER 4.0
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:#define STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF 0.2
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:#define MAT45 mat2(0.7071, -0.7071, 0.7071, 0.7071)
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:#define PERIOD 3.0
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float Hash21(vec2 p) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  p = fract(p * vec2(123.34, 456.21));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  p += dot(p, p + 45.32);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return fract(p.x * p.y);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float tri(float x) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return abs(fract(x) * 2.0 - 1.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float tris(float x) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float t = fract(x);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, abs(2.0 * t - 1.0));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float trisn(float x) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float t = fract(x);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return 2.0 * (1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, abs(2.0 * t - 1.0))) - 1.0;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:vec3 hsv2rgb(vec3 c) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec4 K = vec4(1.0, 2.0 / 3.0, 1.0 / 3.0, 3.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec3 p = abs(fract(c.xxx + K.xyz) * 6.0 - K.www);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return c.z * mix(K.xxx, clamp(p - K.xxx, 0.0, 1.0), c.y);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float Star(vec2 uv, float flare) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float d = length(uv);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float m = (0.05 * uGlowIntensity) / d;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float rays = smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, 1.0 - abs(uv.x * uv.y * 1000.0));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  m += rays * flare * uGlowIntensity;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  uv *= MAT45;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  rays = smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, 1.0 - abs(uv.x * uv.y * 1000.0));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  m += rays * 0.3 * flare * uGlowIntensity;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  m *= smoothstep(1.0, 0.2, d);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return m;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:vec3 StarLayer(vec2 uv) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 gv = fract(uv) - 0.5; 
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 id = floor(uv);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  for (int y = -1; y <= 1; y++) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    for (int x = -1; x <= 1; x++) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec2 offset = vec2(float(x), float(y));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec2 si = id + vec2(float(x), float(y));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float seed = Hash21(si);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float size = fract(seed * 345.32);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float glossLocal = tri(uStarSpeed / (PERIOD * seed + 1.0));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float flareSize = smoothstep(0.9, 1.0, size) * glossLocal;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float red = smoothstep(STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF, 1.0, Hash21(si + 1.0)) + STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float blu = smoothstep(STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF, 1.0, Hash21(si + 3.0)) + STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float grn = min(red, blu) * seed;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec3 base = vec3(red, grn, blu);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float hue = atan(base.g - base.r, base.b - base.r) / (2.0 * 3.14159) + 0.5;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      hue = fract(hue + uHueShift / 360.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float sat = length(base - vec3(dot(base, vec3(0.299, 0.587, 0.114)))) * uSaturation;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float val = max(max(base.r, base.g), base.b);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      base = hsv2rgb(vec3(hue, sat, val));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec2 pad = vec2(tris(seed * 34.0 + uTime * uSpeed / 10.0), tris(seed * 38.0 + uTime * uSpeed / 30.0)) - 0.5;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float star = Star(gv - offset - pad, flareSize);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec3 color = base;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float twinkle = trisn(uTime * uSpeed + seed * 6.2831) * 0.5 + 1.0;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      twinkle = mix(1.0, twinkle, uTwinkleIntensity);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      star *= twinkle;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      col += star * size * color;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    }
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  }
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return col;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 focalPx = uFocal * uResolution.xy;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 uv = (vUv * uResolution.xy - focalPx) / uResolution.y;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 mouseNorm = uMouse - vec2(0.5);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  if (uAutoCenterRepulsion > 0.0) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    vec2 centerUV = vec2(0.0, 0.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    float centerDist = length(uv - centerUV);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    vec2 repulsion = normalize(uv - centerUV) * (uAutoCenterRepulsion / (centerDist + 0.1));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    uv += repulsion * 0.05;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  } else if (uMouseRepulsion) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    vec2 mousePosUV = (uMouse * uResolution.xy - focalPx) / uResolution.y;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    float mouseDist = length(uv - mousePosUV);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    vec2 repulsion = normalize(uv - mousePosUV) * (uRepulsionStrength / (mouseDist + 0.1));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    uv += repulsion * 0.05 * uMouseActiveFactor;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  } else {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    vec2 mouseOffset = mouseNorm * 0.1 * uMouseActiveFactor;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    uv += mouseOffset;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  }
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float autoRotAngle = uTime * uRotationSpeed;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  mat2 autoRot = mat2(cos(autoRotAngle), -sin(autoRotAngle), sin(autoRotAngle), cos(autoRotAngle));
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  uv = autoRot * uv;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  uv = mat2(uRotation.x, -uRotation.y, uRotation.y, uRotation.x) * uv;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  for (float i = 0.0; i < 1.0; i += 1.0 / NUM_LAYER) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    float depth = fract(i + uStarSpeed * uSpeed);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    float scale = mix(20.0 * uDensity, 0.5 * uDensity, depth);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    float fade = depth * smoothstep(1.0, 0.9, depth);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    col += StarLayer(uv * scale + i * 453.32) * fade;
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  }
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  if (uTransparent) {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    float alpha = length(col);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    alpha = smoothstep(0.0, 0.3, alpha);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    alpha = min(alpha, 1.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    gl_FragColor = vec4(col, alpha);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  } else {
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    gl_FragColor = vec4(col, 1.0);
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  }
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
src/components/Galaxy.tsx:`;

src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:export function BlurText({ text, className = "", delay = 0.1 }: BlurTextProps) {
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:  // Split by space for English, or by characters for Chinese if no spaces are found nicely
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:  // Actually, a simple approach is to split by spaces. For CJK, we can just split by characters if there are no spaces.
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:  const hasSpaces = text.includes(" ");
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:  const elements = hasSpaces ? text.split(" ") : text.split("");
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:  
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:  return (
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:    <motion.div 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:      initial="hidden"
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:      whileInView="visible"
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:      viewport={{ once: true, margin: "-50px" }}
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:      className={`flex flex-wrap ${className}`}
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:    >
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:      {elements.map((el, i) => (
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:        <motion.span
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:          key={i}
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:          variants={{
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:            hidden: { filter: 'blur(10px)', opacity: 0, y: 50 },
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:            visible: { 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:              filter: ['blur(10px)', 'blur(5px)', 'blur(0px)'], 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:              opacity: [0, 0.5, 1], 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:              y: [50, -5, 0],
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:              transition: { 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:                duration: 0.7, 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:                delay: delay + (i * (hasSpaces ? 0.1 : 0.05)),
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:                times: [0, 0.5, 1]
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:              } 
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:            }
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:          }}
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:          className={`${hasSpaces ? 'mr-[0.25em]' : 'mr-[0.02em]'} inline-block`}
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:        >
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:          {el}
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:        </motion.span>
src/components/luxury/BlurText.tsx:      ))}

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
