src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        this.uniforms = getUniforms(program);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        this.activeProgram = program;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = value * texture2D(uTexture, vUv);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const displayShaderSource = `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      precision highp float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      precision highp sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      varying vec2 vL;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      varying vec2 vR;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      varying vec2 vT;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      varying vec2 vB;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      uniform sampler2D uTexture;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      uniform sampler2D uDithering;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      uniform vec2 ditherScale;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      uniform vec2 texelSize;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      vec3 linearToGamma (vec3 color) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          color = max(color, vec3(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          return max(1.055 * pow(color, vec3(0.416666667)) - 0.055, vec3(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          vec3 c = texture2D(uTexture, vUv).rgb;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          #ifdef SHADING
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              vec3 lc = texture2D(uTexture, vL).rgb;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              vec3 rc = texture2D(uTexture, vR).rgb;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              vec3 tc = texture2D(uTexture, vT).rgb;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              vec3 bc = texture2D(uTexture, vB).rgb;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              float dx = length(rc) - length(lc);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              float dy = length(tc) - length(bc);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              vec3 n = normalize(vec3(dx, dy, length(texelSize)));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              vec3 l = vec3(0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              float diffuse = clamp(dot(n, l) + 0.7, 0.7, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:              c *= diffuse;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          #endif
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          float a = max(c.r, max(c.g, c.b));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          gl_FragColor = vec4(c, a);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    `;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const splatShader = compileShader(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uTarget;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float aspectRatio;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform vec3 color;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform vec2 point;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float radius;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 p = vUv - point.xy;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            p.x *= aspectRatio;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec3 splat = exp(-dot(p, p) / radius) * color;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec3 base = texture2D(uTarget, vUv).xyz;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(base + splat, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const advectionShader = compileShader(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uSource;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform vec2 texelSize;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform vec2 dyeTexelSize;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float dt;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float dissipation;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        vec4 bilerp (sampler2D sam, vec2 uv, vec2 tsize) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 st = uv / tsize - 0.5;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 iuv = floor(st);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 fuv = fract(st);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 a = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(0.5, 0.5)) * tsize);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 b = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(1.5, 0.5)) * tsize);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 c = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(0.5, 1.5)) * tsize);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 d = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(1.5, 1.5)) * tsize);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            return mix(mix(a, b, fuv.x), mix(c, d, fuv.x), fuv.y);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            #ifdef MANUAL_FILTERING
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:                vec2 coord = vUv - dt * bilerp(uVelocity, vUv, texelSize).xy * texelSize;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:                vec4 result = bilerp(uSource, coord, dyeTexelSize);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            #else
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:                vec2 coord = vUv - dt * texture2D(uVelocity, vUv).xy * texelSize;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:                vec4 result = texture2D(uSource, coord);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            #endif
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float decay = 1.0 + dissipation * dt;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = result / decay;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      ext.supportLinearFiltering ? null : ['MANUAL_FILTERING']
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const divergenceShader = compileShader(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vUv;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vL;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vR;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vT;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vB;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float L = texture2D(uVelocity, vL).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float R = texture2D(uVelocity, vR).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float T = texture2D(uVelocity, vT).y;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float B = texture2D(uVelocity, vB).y;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 C = texture2D(uVelocity, vUv).xy;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vL.x < 0.0) { L = -C.x; }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vR.x > 1.0) { R = -C.x; }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vT.y > 1.0) { T = -C.y; }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vB.y < 0.0) { B = -C.y; }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float div = 0.5 * (R - L + T - B);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(div, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const curlShader = compileShader(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vUv;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vL;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vR;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vT;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vB;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float L = texture2D(uVelocity, vL).y;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float R = texture2D(uVelocity, vR).y;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float T = texture2D(uVelocity, vT).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float B = texture2D(uVelocity, vB).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float vorticity = R - L - T + B;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(0.5 * vorticity, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const vorticityShader = compileShader(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vL;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vR;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vT;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vB;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uCurl;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float curl;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float dt;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float L = texture2D(uCurl, vL).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float R = texture2D(uCurl, vR).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float T = texture2D(uCurl, vT).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float B = texture2D(uCurl, vB).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float C = texture2D(uCurl, vUv).x;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 force = 0.5 * vec2(abs(T) - abs(B), abs(R) - abs(L));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            force /= length(force) + 0.0001;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            force *= curl * C;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            force.y *= -1.0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 velocity = texture2D(uVelocity, vUv).xy;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            velocity += force * dt;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            velocity = min(max(velocity, -1000.0), 1000.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(velocity, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const pressureShader = compileShader(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump float;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump sampler2D;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vUv;

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function initFramebuffers() {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let simRes = getResolution(config.SIM_RESOLUTION);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let dyeRes = getResolution(config.DYE_RESOLUTION);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const texType = ext.halfFloatTexType;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const rgba = ext.formatRGBA;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const rg = ext.formatRG;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const r = ext.formatR;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!rgba || !rg || !r) return;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const filtering = ext.supportLinearFiltering ? gl.LINEAR : gl.NEAREST;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.disable(gl.BLEND);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!dye)
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        dye = createDoubleFBO(dyeRes.width, dyeRes.height, rgba.internalFormat, rgba.format, texType, filtering);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      else
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        dye = resizeDoubleFBO(dye, dyeRes.width, dyeRes.height, rgba.internalFormat, rgba.format, texType, filtering);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!velocity)
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        velocity = createDoubleFBO(simRes.width, simRes.height, rg.internalFormat, rg.format, texType, filtering);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      else
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        velocity = resizeDoubleFBO(
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          velocity,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          simRes.width,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          simRes.height,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          rg.internalFormat,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          rg.format,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          texType,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          filtering
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        );
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      divergence = createFBO(simRes.width, simRes.height, r.internalFormat, r.format, texType, gl.NEAREST);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      curl = createFBO(simRes.width, simRes.height, r.internalFormat, r.format, texType, gl.NEAREST);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pressure = createDoubleFBO(simRes.width, simRes.height, r.internalFormat, r.format, texType, gl.NEAREST);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      isInitialized = true;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function createFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.activeTexture(gl.TEXTURE0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let texture = gl.createTexture();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.bindTexture(gl.TEXTURE_2D, texture);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_MIN_FILTER, param);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_MAG_FILTER, param);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_WRAP_S, gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_WRAP_T, gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texImage2D(gl.TEXTURE_2D, 0, internalFormat, w, h, 0, format, type, null);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let fbo = gl.createFramebuffer();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.bindFramebuffer(gl.FRAMEBUFFER, fbo);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.framebufferTexture2D(gl.FRAMEBUFFER, gl.COLOR_ATTACHMENT0, gl.TEXTURE_2D, texture, 0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.viewport(0, 0, w, h);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.clear(gl.COLOR_BUFFER_BIT);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let texelSizeX = 1.0 / w;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let texelSizeY = 1.0 / h;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        texture,
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        fbo,

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          return fbo2;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        },

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        },

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          fbo2 = temp;

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      };

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function calcDeltaTime() {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let now = Date.now();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let dt = (now - lastUpdateTime) / 1000;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      dt = Math.min(dt, 0.016666);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      lastUpdateTime = now;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return dt;

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return false;

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function updateColors(dt) {

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (colorUpdateTimer >= 1) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        colorUpdateTimer = wrap(colorUpdateTimer, 0, 1);

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          pointers.forEach(p => {

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function applyInputs() {

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function step(dt) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.disable(gl.BLEND);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      curlProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(curlProgram.uniforms.texelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(curlProgram.uniforms.uVelocity, velocity.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(curl);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      vorticityProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(vorticityProgram.uniforms.texelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(vorticityProgram.uniforms.uVelocity, velocity.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(vorticityProgram.uniforms.uCurl, curl.attach(1));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(vorticityProgram.uniforms.curl, config.CURL);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(vorticityProgram.uniforms.dt, dt);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(velocity.write);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      velocity.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      divergenceProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(divergenceProgram.uniforms.texelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(divergenceProgram.uniforms.uVelocity, velocity.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(divergence);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      clearProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(clearProgram.uniforms.uTexture, pressure.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(clearProgram.uniforms.value, config.PRESSURE);

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pressure.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pressureProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(pressureProgram.uniforms.texelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(pressureProgram.uniforms.uDivergence, divergence.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < config.PRESSURE_ITERATIONS; i++) {

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        blit(pressure.write);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        pressure.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gradienSubtractProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(gradienSubtractProgram.uniforms.texelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(gradienSubtractProgram.uniforms.uPressure, pressure.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(gradienSubtractProgram.uniforms.uVelocity, velocity.read.attach(1));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(velocity.write);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      velocity.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      advectionProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(advectionProgram.uniforms.texelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!ext.supportLinearFiltering)
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        gl.uniform2f(advectionProgram.uniforms.dyeTexelSize, velocity.texelSizeX, velocity.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let velocityId = velocity.read.attach(0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(advectionProgram.uniforms.uVelocity, velocityId);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(advectionProgram.uniforms.uSource, velocityId);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(advectionProgram.uniforms.dt, dt);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(advectionProgram.uniforms.dissipation, config.VELOCITY_DISSIPATION);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(velocity.write);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      velocity.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!ext.supportLinearFiltering)
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        gl.uniform2f(advectionProgram.uniforms.dyeTexelSize, dye.texelSizeX, dye.texelSizeY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(advectionProgram.uniforms.uVelocity, velocity.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(advectionProgram.uniforms.uSource, dye.read.attach(1));

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let height = target == null ? gl.drawingBufferHeight : target.height;

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function splatPointer(pointer) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let dx = pointer.deltaX * config.SPLAT_FORCE;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let dy = pointer.deltaY * config.SPLAT_FORCE;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      splat(pointer.texcoordX, pointer.texcoordY, dx, dy, pointer.color);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function clickSplat(pointer) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const color = generateColor();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      color.r *= 10.0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      color.g *= 10.0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      color.b *= 10.0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let dx = 10 * (Math.random() - 0.5);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let dy = 30 * (Math.random() - 0.5);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      splat(pointer.texcoordX, pointer.texcoordY, dx, dy, color);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function splat(x, y, dx, dy, color) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      splatProgram.bind();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(splatProgram.uniforms.uTarget, velocity.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(splatProgram.uniforms.aspectRatio, canvas.width / canvas.height);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform2f(splatProgram.uniforms.point, x, y);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform3f(splatProgram.uniforms.color, dx, dy, 0.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1f(splatProgram.uniforms.radius, correctRadius(config.SPLAT_RADIUS / 100.0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(velocity.write);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      velocity.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(splatProgram.uniforms.uTarget, dye.read.attach(0));
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform3f(splatProgram.uniforms.color, color.r, color.g, color.b);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(dye.write);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      dye.swap();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function correctRadius(radius) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let aspectRatio = canvas.width / canvas.height;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (aspectRatio > 1) radius *= aspectRatio;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return radius;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function updatePointerDownData(pointer, id, posX, posY) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.id = id;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.down = true;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.moved = false;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.texcoordX = posX / canvas.width;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.texcoordY = 1.0 - posY / canvas.height;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.prevTexcoordX = pointer.texcoordX;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.prevTexcoordY = pointer.texcoordY;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.deltaX = 0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.deltaY = 0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.color = generateColor();
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function updatePointerMoveData(pointer, posX, posY, color) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.prevTexcoordX = pointer.texcoordX;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.prevTexcoordY = pointer.texcoordY;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.texcoordX = posX / canvas.width;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.texcoordY = 1.0 - posY / canvas.height;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.deltaX = correctDeltaX(pointer.texcoordX - pointer.prevTexcoordX);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.deltaY = correctDeltaY(pointer.texcoordY - pointer.prevTexcoordY);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.moved = Math.abs(pointer.deltaX) > 0 || Math.abs(pointer.deltaY) > 0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.color = color;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function updatePointerUpData(pointer) {

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function correctDeltaX(delta) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let aspectRatio = canvas.width / canvas.height;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (aspectRatio < 1) delta *= aspectRatio;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return delta;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function correctDeltaY(delta) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let aspectRatio = canvas.width / canvas.height;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (aspectRatio > 1) delta /= aspectRatio;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return delta;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function hexToRGB(hex) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let val = hex.replace('#', '');
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (val.length === 3) val = val[0] + val[0] + val[1] + val[1] + val[2] + val[2];
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const r = parseInt(val.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const g = parseInt(val.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const b = parseInt(val.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return { r: r * 0.15, g: g * 0.15, b: b * 0.15 };
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function generateColor() {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!config.RAINBOW_MODE) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        return hexToRGB(config.COLOR);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let c = HSVtoRGB(Math.random(), 1.0, 1.0);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      c.r *= 0.15;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      c.g *= 0.15;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      c.b *= 0.15;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return c;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function HSVtoRGB(h, s, v) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let r, g, b, i, f, p, q, t;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      i = Math.floor(h * 6);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      f = h * 6 - i;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      p = v * (1 - s);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      q = v * (1 - f * s);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      t = v * (1 - (1 - f) * s);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      switch (i % 6) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 0:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = v;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = t;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = p;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 1:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = q;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = v;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = p;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 2:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = p;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = v;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = t;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 3:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = p;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = q;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = v;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 4:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = t;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = p;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = v;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 5:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = v;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = p;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = q;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        default:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return { r, g, b };
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function wrap(value, min, max) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const range = max - min;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (range === 0) return min;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return ((value - min) % range) + min;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function getResolution(resolution) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let aspectRatio = gl.drawingBufferWidth / gl.drawingBufferHeight;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (aspectRatio < 1) aspectRatio = 1.0 / aspectRatio;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const min = Math.round(resolution);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const max = Math.round(resolution * aspectRatio);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (gl.drawingBufferWidth > gl.drawingBufferHeight) return { width: max, height: min };
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      else return { width: min, height: max };

src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function scaleByPixelRatio(input) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const pixelRatio = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return Math.floor(input * pixelRatio);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function hashCode(s) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (s.length === 0) return 0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let hash = 0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        hash = (hash << 5) - hash + s.charCodeAt(i);
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        hash |= 0;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return hash;
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function handleMouseDown(e) {

src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:export default function ParticleBackground() {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    let animationFrameId: number;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    let particles: Particle[] = [];
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    class Particle {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      x: number;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      y: number;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      vx: number;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      vy: number;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      size: number;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      color: string;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      constructor(width: number, height: number) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.x = Math.random() * width;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.y = Math.random() * height;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        // 缓慢优雅的移动
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.size = Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        // 主题色：粉桔色与白色交织
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.color = Math.random() > 0.4 ? 'rgba(255, 180, 168, ' : 'rgba(226, 226, 226, '; 
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      update(width: number, height: number) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.x += this.vx;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.y += this.vy;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.x < 0) this.vx *= -1;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.x > width) this.vx *= -1;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.y < 0) this.vy *= -1;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.y > height) this.vy *= -1;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      draw(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.beginPath();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.fillStyle = this.color + '0.7)';
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.fill();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const init = () => {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      // 在浏览器中获取当前容器的实际宽度，高度适配Hero的 1200px
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      canvas.height = 1200;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      particles = [];
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      // 根据屏幕宽度自动调整粒子数量
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      const particleCount = Math.min(Math.floor(window.innerWidth / 12), 150);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        particles.push(new Particle(canvas.width, canvas.height));
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const animate = () => {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        particles[i].update(canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        particles[i].draw(ctx);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        for (let j = i + 1; j < particles.length; j++) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          const dx = particles[i].x - particles[j].x;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          const dy = particles[i].y - particles[j].y;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          // 粒子靠得足够近时，绘制动态连线 (模拟工作流/神经网络)
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          if (distance < 140) {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.beginPath();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            const opacity = 0.25 - (distance / 560);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 180, 168, ${opacity > 0 ? opacity : 0})`;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.moveTo(particles[i].x, particles[i].y);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.lineTo(particles[j].x, particles[j].y);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.stroke();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    init();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    animate();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const handleResize = () => {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      init();
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  return (
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    <canvas
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      ref={canvasRef}
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-[1200px] z-0 opacity-80 pointer-events-none"
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    />
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  );
src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:}

src/components/Radar.tsx:import { Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle } from 'ogl';
src/components/Radar.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:import './Radar.css';
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:function hexToVec3(hex: string) {
src/components/Radar.tsx:  const h = hex.replace('#', '');
src/components/Radar.tsx:  return [
src/components/Radar.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255,
src/components/Radar.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255,
src/components/Radar.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255
src/components/Radar.tsx:  ] as [number, number, number];
src/components/Radar.tsx:}
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:const vertexShader = `
src/components/Radar.tsx:attribute vec2 uv;
src/components/Radar.tsx:attribute vec2 position;
src/components/Radar.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/Radar.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Radar.tsx:  vUv = uv;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 0, 1);
src/components/Radar.tsx:}
src/components/Radar.tsx:`;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:const fragmentShader = `
src/components/Radar.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec3 uResolution;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uScale;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uRingCount;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSpokeCount;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uRingThickness;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSpokeThickness;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSweepSpeed;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSweepWidth;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSweepLobes;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec3 uBgColor;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uFalloff;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uBrightness;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec2 uMouse;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uMouseInfluence;
src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform bool uEnableMouse;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:#define TAU 6.28318530718
src/components/Radar.tsx:#define PI 3.14159265359
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Radar.tsx:  vec2 st = gl_FragCoord.xy / uResolution.xy;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  st = st * 2.0 - 1.0;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  st.x *= uResolution.x / uResolution.y;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  if (uEnableMouse) {
src/components/Radar.tsx:    vec2 mShift = (uMouse * 2.0 - 1.0);
src/components/Radar.tsx:    mShift.x *= uResolution.x / uResolution.y;
src/components/Radar.tsx:    st -= mShift * uMouseInfluence;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  }
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  st *= uScale;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float dist = length(st);
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float theta = atan(st.y, st.x);
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float t = uTime * uSpeed;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float ringPhase = dist * uRingCount - t;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float ringDist = abs(fract(ringPhase) - 0.5);
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float ringGlow = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, uRingThickness, ringDist);
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float spokeAngle = abs(fract(theta * uSpokeCount / TAU + 0.5) - 0.5) * TAU / uSpokeCount;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float arcDist = spokeAngle * dist;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float spokeGlow = (1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, uSpokeThickness, arcDist)) * smoothstep(0.0, 0.1, dist);
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float sweepPhase = t * uSweepSpeed;
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float sweepBeam = pow(max(0.5 * sin(uSweepLobes * theta + sweepPhase) + 0.5, 0.0), uSweepWidth);
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float fade = smoothstep(1.05, 0.85, dist) * pow(max(1.0 - dist, 0.0), uFalloff);
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float intensity = max((ringGlow + spokeGlow + sweepBeam) * fade * uBrightness, 0.0);
src/components/Radar.tsx:  vec3 col = uColor * intensity + uBgColor;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  float alpha = clamp(length(col), 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/Radar.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(col, alpha);
src/components/Radar.tsx:}
src/components/Radar.tsx:`;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:export default function Radar({
src/components/Radar.tsx:  speed = 1.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  scale = 0.5,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  ringCount = 10.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  spokeCount = 10.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  ringThickness = 0.05,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  spokeThickness = 0.01,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepSpeed = 1.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepWidth = 2.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepLobes = 1.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  color = '#9f29ff',
src/components/Radar.tsx:  backgroundColor = '#000000',
src/components/Radar.tsx:  falloff = 2.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  brightness = 1.0,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  enableMouseInteraction = true,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  mouseInfluence = 0.1
src/components/Radar.tsx:}: {
src/components/Radar.tsx:  speed?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  scale?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  ringCount?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  spokeCount?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  ringThickness?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  spokeThickness?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepSpeed?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepWidth?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepLobes?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  color?: string,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  backgroundColor?: string,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  falloff?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  brightness?: number,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  enableMouseInteraction?: boolean,
src/components/Radar.tsx:  mouseInfluence?: number
src/components/Radar.tsx:}) {
src/components/Radar.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/Radar.tsx:    if (!containerRef.current) return;
src/components/Radar.tsx:    const container = containerRef.current;
src/components/Radar.tsx:    
src/components/Radar.tsx:    // Check if container already has a canvas (precaution)
src/components/Radar.tsx:    if (container.querySelector('canvas')) return;
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:    const renderer = new Renderer({ alpha: true, premultipliedAlpha: false });
src/components/Radar.tsx:    const gl = renderer.gl;
src/components/Radar.tsx:    gl.clearColor(0, 0, 0, 0);
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:    let program: Program;
src/components/Radar.tsx:    let currentMouse = [0.5, 0.5];
src/components/Radar.tsx:    let targetMouse = [0.5, 0.5];
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:    function handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {
src/components/Radar.tsx:      const rect = gl.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/Radar.tsx:      targetMouse = [
src/components/Radar.tsx:        (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width,
src/components/Radar.tsx:        1.0 - (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height
src/components/Radar.tsx:      ];
src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:    function handleMouseLeave() {
src/components/Radar.tsx:      targetMouse = [0.5, 0.5];
src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:    function resize() {
src/components/Radar.tsx:      renderer.setSize(container.offsetWidth, container.offsetHeight);
src/components/Radar.tsx:      if (program) {
src/components/Radar.tsx:        program.uniforms.uResolution.value = [gl.canvas.width, gl.canvas.height, gl.canvas.width / gl.canvas.height];
src/components/Radar.tsx:      }
src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
src/components/Radar.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/Radar.tsx:    resize();
src/components/Radar.tsx:
src/components/Radar.tsx:    const geometry = new Triangle(gl);
src/components/Radar.tsx:    program = new Program(gl, {
src/components/Radar.tsx:      vertex: vertexShader,
src/components/Radar.tsx:      fragment: fragmentShader,
src/components/Radar.tsx:      uniforms: {
src/components/Radar.tsx:        uTime: { value: 0 },

src/components/Grainient.tsx:const hexToRgb = (hex: string) => {
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  const result = /^#?([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})$/i.exec(hex);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  if (!result) return [1, 1, 1];
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  return [parseInt(result[1], 16) / 255, parseInt(result[2], 16) / 255, parseInt(result[3], 16) / 255];

src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:const fragment = `#version 300 es
src/components/Grainient.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec2 iResolution;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float iTime;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uTimeSpeed;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uColorBalance;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uWarpStrength;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uWarpFrequency;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uWarpSpeed;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uWarpAmplitude;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uBlendAngle;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uBlendSoftness;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uRotationAmount;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uNoiseScale;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uGrainAmount;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uGrainScale;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uGrainAnimated;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uContrast;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uGamma;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uSaturation;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec2 uCenterOffset;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float uZoom;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor1;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor2;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor3;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:out vec4 fragColor;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:#define S(a,b,t) smoothstep(a,b,t)
src/components/Grainient.tsx:mat2 Rot(float a){float s=sin(a),c=cos(a);return mat2(c,-s,s,c);} 
src/components/Grainient.tsx:vec2 hash(vec2 p){p=vec2(dot(p,vec2(2127.1,81.17)),dot(p,vec2(1269.5,283.37)));return fract(sin(p)*43758.5453);} 
src/components/Grainient.tsx:float noise(vec2 p){vec2 i=floor(p),f=fract(p),u=f*f*(3.0-2.0*f);float n=mix(mix(dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(0.0,0.0)),f-vec2(0.0,0.0)),dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(1.0,0.0)),f-vec2(1.0,0.0)),u.x),mix(dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(0.0,1.0)),f-vec2(0.0,1.0)),dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(1.0,1.0)),f-vec2(1.0,1.0)),u.x),u.y);return 0.5+0.5*n;}
src/components/Grainient.tsx:void mainImage(out vec4 o, vec2 C){
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float t=iTime*uTimeSpeed;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec2 uv=C/iResolution.xy;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float ratio=iResolution.x/iResolution.y;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec2 tuv=uv-0.5+uCenterOffset;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv/=max(uZoom,0.001);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float degree=noise(vec2(t*0.1,tuv.x*tuv.y)*uNoiseScale);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.y*=1.0/ratio;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv*=Rot(radians((degree-0.5)*uRotationAmount+180.0));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.y*=ratio;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float frequency=uWarpFrequency;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float ws=max(uWarpStrength,0.001);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float amplitude=uWarpAmplitude/ws;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float warpTime=t*uWarpSpeed;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.x+=sin(tuv.y*frequency+warpTime)/amplitude;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.y+=sin(tuv.x*(frequency*1.5)+warpTime)/(amplitude*0.5);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 colLav=uColor1;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 colOrg=uColor2;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 colDark=uColor3;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float b=uColorBalance;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float s=max(uBlendSoftness,0.0);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  mat2 blendRot=Rot(radians(uBlendAngle));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float blendX=(tuv*blendRot).x;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float edge0=-0.3-b-s;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float edge1=0.2-b+s;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float v0=0.5-b+s;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float v1=-0.3-b-s;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 layer1=mix(colDark,colOrg,S(edge0,edge1,blendX));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 layer2=mix(colOrg,colLav,S(edge0,edge1,blendX));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 col=mix(layer1,layer2,S(v0,v1,tuv.y));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec2 grainUv=uv*max(uGrainScale,0.001);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  if(uGrainAnimated>0.5){grainUv+=vec2(iTime*0.05);} 
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float grain=fract(sin(dot(grainUv,vec2(12.9898,78.233)))*43758.5453);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  col+=(grain-0.5)*uGrainAmount;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  col=(col-0.5)*uContrast+0.5;
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float luma=dot(col,vec3(0.2126,0.7152,0.0722));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  col=mix(vec3(luma),col,uSaturation);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  col=pow(max(col,0.0),vec3(1.0/max(uGamma,0.001)));
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  col=clamp(col,0.0,1.0);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:
src/components/Grainient.tsx:  o=vec4(col,1.0);
src/components/Grainient.tsx:}

src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const rotationX = (offsetY / (rect.height / 2)) * -rotateAmplitude;
src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const rotationY = (offsetX / (rect.width / 2)) * rotateAmplitude;

src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    y.set(e.clientY - rect.top);

src/components/Dock.tsx:import React, { Children, cloneElement, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState, ReactElement } from 'react';
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:import './Dock.css';
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:interface DockItemProps {
src/components/Dock.tsx:  key?: React.Key;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  children?: React.ReactNode;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  className?: string;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  onClick?: () => void;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  mouseX: any;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  spring: any;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  distance: number;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  magnification: number;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  baseItemSize: number;
src/components/Dock.tsx:}
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:function DockItem({ children, className = '', onClick, mouseX, spring, distance, magnification, baseItemSize }: DockItemProps) {
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const isHovered = useMotionValue(0);
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const mouseDistance = useTransform(mouseX, (val: number) => {
src/components/Dock.tsx:    const rect = ref.current?.getBoundingClientRect() ?? {
src/components/Dock.tsx:      x: 0,
src/components/Dock.tsx:      width: baseItemSize
src/components/Dock.tsx:    };
src/components/Dock.tsx:    return val - rect.x - baseItemSize / 2;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  });
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const targetSize = useTransform(mouseDistance, [-distance, 0, distance], [baseItemSize, magnification, baseItemSize]);
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const size = useSpring(targetSize, spring);
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:  return (
src/components/Dock.tsx:    <motion.div
src/components/Dock.tsx:      ref={ref}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      style={{
src/components/Dock.tsx:        width: size,
src/components/Dock.tsx:        height: size
src/components/Dock.tsx:      }}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      onHoverStart={() => isHovered.set(1)}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      onHoverEnd={() => isHovered.set(0)}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      onFocus={() => isHovered.set(1)}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      onBlur={() => isHovered.set(0)}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      onClick={onClick}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      className={`dock-item ${className}`}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      tabIndex={0}
src/components/Dock.tsx:      role="button"
src/components/Dock.tsx:      aria-haspopup="true"
src/components/Dock.tsx:    >
src/components/Dock.tsx:      {Children.map(children, child => {
src/components/Dock.tsx:        if (React.isValidElement(child)) {
src/components/Dock.tsx:          return cloneElement(child as ReactElement<any>, { isHovered });
src/components/Dock.tsx:        }
src/components/Dock.tsx:        return child;
src/components/Dock.tsx:      })}
src/components/Dock.tsx:    </motion.div>
src/components/Dock.tsx:  );
src/components/Dock.tsx:}
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:function DockLabel({ children, className = '', isHovered }: any) {
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false);
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/Dock.tsx:    if (!isHovered) return;
src/components/Dock.tsx:    const unsubscribe = isHovered.on('change', (latest: number) => {
src/components/Dock.tsx:      setIsVisible(latest === 1);
src/components/Dock.tsx:    });
src/components/Dock.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/components/Dock.tsx:  }, [isHovered]);
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:  return (
src/components/Dock.tsx:    <AnimatePresence>
src/components/Dock.tsx:      {isVisible && (
src/components/Dock.tsx:        <motion.div
src/components/Dock.tsx:          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
src/components/Dock.tsx:          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/components/Dock.tsx:          exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
src/components/Dock.tsx:          transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
src/components/Dock.tsx:          className={`dock-label ${className}`}
src/components/Dock.tsx:          role="tooltip"
src/components/Dock.tsx:        >
src/components/Dock.tsx:          {children}
src/components/Dock.tsx:        </motion.div>
src/components/Dock.tsx:      )}
src/components/Dock.tsx:    </AnimatePresence>
src/components/Dock.tsx:  );
src/components/Dock.tsx:}
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:function DockIcon({ children, className = '' }: any) {

src/components/Dock.tsx:}

src/components/Dock.tsx:export interface DockProps {
src/components/Dock.tsx:  items: DockItemData[];
src/components/Dock.tsx:  className?: string;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  spring?: any;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  magnification?: number;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  distance?: number;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  panelHeight?: number;
src/components/Dock.tsx:  dockHeight?: number;

src/components/Dock.tsx:  activeItem?: string;

src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:export default function Dock({
src/components/Dock.tsx:  items,
src/components/Dock.tsx:  className = '',
src/components/Dock.tsx:  spring = { mass: 0.1, stiffness: 150, damping: 12 },
src/components/Dock.tsx:  magnification = 70,
src/components/Dock.tsx:  distance = 200,
src/components/Dock.tsx:  panelHeight = 68,
src/components/Dock.tsx:  dockHeight = 100,
src/components/Dock.tsx:  baseItemSize = 40,
src/components/Dock.tsx:  activeItem = ''
src/components/Dock.tsx:}: DockProps) {
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const mouseX = useMotionValue(Infinity);
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const isHovered = useMotionValue(0);
src/components/Dock.tsx:
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const maxHeight = useMemo(
src/components/Dock.tsx:    () => Math.max(dockHeight, magnification + magnification / 2 + 4),
src/components/Dock.tsx:    [magnification, dockHeight]
src/components/Dock.tsx:  );
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const heightRow = useTransform(isHovered, [0, 1], [panelHeight, maxHeight]);
src/components/Dock.tsx:  const height = useSpring(heightRow, spring);
src/components/Dock.tsx:

src/components/ColorBends.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:import * as THREE from 'three';
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:import './ColorBends.css';
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:const MAX_COLORS = 8;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:const frag = `
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:#define MAX_COLORS ${MAX_COLORS}
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec2 uCanvas;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec2 uRot;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform int uColorCount;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec3 uColors[MAX_COLORS];
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform int uTransparent;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uScale;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uFrequency;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uWarpStrength;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec2 uPointer; // in NDC [-1,1]
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uMouseInfluence;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uParallax;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uNoise;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform int uIterations;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uIntensity;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uBandWidth;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:void main() {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  float t = uTime * uSpeed;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 p = vUv * 2.0 - 1.0;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  p += uPointer * uParallax * 0.1;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 rp = vec2(p.x * uRot.x - p.y * uRot.y, p.x * uRot.y + p.y * uRot.x);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 q = vec2(rp.x * (uCanvas.x / uCanvas.y), rp.y);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q /= max(uScale, 0.0001);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q /= 0.5 + 0.2 * dot(q, q);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q += 0.2 * cos(t) - 7.56;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 toward = (uPointer - rp);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q += toward * uMouseInfluence * 0.2;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    for (int j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      if (j >= uIterations - 1) break;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      vec2 rr = sin(1.5 * (q.yx * uFrequency) + 2.0 * cos(q * uFrequency));
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      q += (rr - q) * 0.15;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    }
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    float a = 1.0;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    if (uColorCount > 0) {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      vec2 s = q;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      vec3 sumCol = vec3(0.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      float cover = 0.0;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      for (int i = 0; i < MAX_COLORS; ++i) {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            if (i >= uColorCount) break;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            s -= 0.01;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 r = sin(1.5 * (s.yx * uFrequency) + 2.0 * cos(s * uFrequency));
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m0 = length(r + sin(5.0 * r.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(i)) / 4.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kMix = pow(kBelow, 0.3); // strong response across 0..1
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float gain = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength - 1.0, 0.0); // allow >1 to amplify displacement
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 disp = (r - s) * kBelow;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 warped = s + disp * gain;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m1 = length(warped + sin(5.0 * warped.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(i)) / 4.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m = mix(m0, m1, kMix);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float w = 1.0 - exp(-uBandWidth / exp(uBandWidth * m));
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            sumCol += uColors[i] * w;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            cover = max(cover, w);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      }
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      col = clamp(sumCol, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      a = uTransparent > 0 ? cover : 1.0;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    } else {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        vec2 s = q;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        for (int k = 0; k < 3; ++k) {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            s -= 0.01;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 r = sin(1.5 * (s.yx * uFrequency) + 2.0 * cos(s * uFrequency));
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m0 = length(r + sin(5.0 * r.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(k)) / 4.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kMix = pow(kBelow, 0.3);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float gain = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength - 1.0, 0.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 disp = (r - s) * kBelow;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 warped = s + disp * gain;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m1 = length(warped + sin(5.0 * warped.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(k)) / 4.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m = mix(m0, m1, kMix);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            col[k] = 1.0 - exp(-uBandWidth / exp(uBandWidth * m));
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        }
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        a = uTransparent > 0 ? max(max(col.r, col.g), col.b) : 1.0;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    }
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    col *= uIntensity;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    if (uNoise > 0.0001) {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      float n = fract(sin(dot(gl_FragCoord.xy + vec2(uTime), vec2(12.9898, 78.233))) * 43758.5453123);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      col += (n - 0.5) * uNoise;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      col = clamp(col, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    }
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    vec3 rgb = (uTransparent > 0) ? col * a : col;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    gl_FragColor = vec4(rgb, a);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:}
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:`;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:const vert = `
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:void main() {
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vUv = uv;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 1.0);
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:}
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:`;
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:export default function ColorBends({
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  className = '',
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  style = {},
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  rotation = 90,
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  speed = 0.2,
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  colors = [],
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  transparent = true,
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  autoRotate = 0,
src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  scale = 1,

src/components/LetterGlitch.tsx:      g: Math.round(start.g + (end.g - start.g) * factor),

src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  const easeFunc = useCallback(
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    t => {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      switch (easing) {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        case 'linear':
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        case 'ease-in':
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t * t;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        case 'ease-in-out':
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        default:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t * (2 - t);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      }
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    },
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    [easing]
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  );
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    let animationId;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    const draw = timestamp => {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      if (!startTimeRef.current) {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        startTimeRef.current = timestamp;

src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      sparksRef.current = sparksRef.current.filter(spark => {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const elapsed = timestamp - spark.startTime;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        if (elapsed >= duration) {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return false;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        }
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const progress = elapsed / duration;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const eased = easeFunc(progress);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const distance = eased * sparkRadius * extraScale;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const lineLength = sparkSize * (1 - eased);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const x1 = spark.x + distance * Math.cos(spark.angle);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const y1 = spark.y + distance * Math.sin(spark.angle);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const x2 = spark.x + (distance + lineLength) * Math.cos(spark.angle);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        const y2 = spark.y + (distance + lineLength) * Math.sin(spark.angle);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.strokeStyle = sparkColor;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.beginPath();
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.stroke();
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        return true;
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      });
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    };
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    animationId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    };
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  }, [sparkColor, sparkSize, sparkRadius, sparkCount, duration, easeFunc, extraScale]);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    const handleClick = e => {

src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      const now = performance.now();
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      const newSparks = Array.from({ length: sparkCount }, (_, i) => ({
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        x,
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        y,
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        angle: (2 * Math.PI * i) / sparkCount,
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        startTime: now

src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      sparksRef.current.push(...newSparks);

src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    return () => {

src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    };
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  }, [sparkCount]);
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:
src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  return (

src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function parseHSL(hslStr: string) {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const match = hslStr.match(/([\d.]+)\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*([\d.]+)%?/);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  if (!match) return { h: 40, s: 80, l: 80 };
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  return { h: parseFloat(match[1]), s: parseFloat(match[2]), l: parseFloat(match[3]) };
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function buildGlowVars(glowColor: string, intensity: number) {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const { h, s, l } = parseHSL(glowColor);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const base = `${h}deg ${s}% ${l}%`;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const opacities = [100, 60, 50, 40, 30, 20, 10];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const keys = ['', '-60', '-50', '-40', '-30', '-20', '-10'];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const vars: Record<string, string> = {};
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  for (let i = 0; i < opacities.length; i++) {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    vars[`--glow-color${keys[i]}`] = `hsl(${base} / ${Math.min(opacities[i] * intensity, 100)}%)`;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  return vars;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:const GRADIENT_POSITIONS = ['80% 55%', '69% 34%', '8% 6%', '41% 38%', '86% 85%', '82% 18%', '51% 4%'];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:const GRADIENT_KEYS = ['--gradient-one', '--gradient-two', '--gradient-three', '--gradient-four', '--gradient-five', '--gradient-six', '--gradient-seven'];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:const COLOR_MAP = [0, 1, 2, 0, 1, 2, 1];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function buildGradientVars(colors: string[]) {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const vars: Record<string, string> = {};
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const c = colors[Math.min(COLOR_MAP[i], colors.length - 1)];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    vars[GRADIENT_KEYS[i]] = `radial-gradient(at ${GRADIENT_POSITIONS[i]}, ${c} 0px, transparent 50%)`;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  vars['--gradient-base'] = `linear-gradient(${colors[0]} 0 100%)`;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  return vars;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function easeOutCubic(x: number) { return 1 - Math.pow(1 - x, 3); }
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function easeInCubic(x: number) { return x * x * x; }
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function animateValue({ start = 0, end = 100, duration = 1000, delay = 0, ease = easeOutCubic, onUpdate, onEnd }: any) {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const t0 = performance.now() + delay;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  function tick() {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const elapsed = performance.now() - t0;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const t = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    onUpdate(start + (end - start) * ease(t));
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    else if (onEnd) onEnd();
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  setTimeout(() => requestAnimationFrame(tick), delay);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}

src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  animated?: boolean,
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  colors?: string[],
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  fillOpacity?: number,
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}) => {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const cardRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const getCenterOfElement = useCallback((el: HTMLElement) => {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const { width, height } = el.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    return [width / 2, height / 2];
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const getEdgeProximity = useCallback((el: HTMLElement, x: number, y: number) => {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const [cx, cy] = getCenterOfElement(el);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dx = x - cx;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dy = y - cy;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    let kx = Infinity;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    let ky = Infinity;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (dx !== 0) kx = cx / Math.abs(dx);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (dy !== 0) ky = cy / Math.abs(dy);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    return Math.min(Math.max(1 / Math.min(kx, ky), 0), 1);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, [getCenterOfElement]);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const getCursorAngle = useCallback((el: HTMLElement, x: number, y: number) => {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const [cx, cy] = getCenterOfElement(el);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dx = x - cx;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dy = y - cy;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) return 0;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const radians = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    let degrees = radians * (180 / Math.PI) + 90;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (degrees < 0) degrees += 360;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    return degrees;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, [getCenterOfElement]);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const handlePointerMove = useCallback((e: React.PointerEvent) => {
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const card = cardRef.current;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (!card) return;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const edge = getEdgeProximity(card, x, y);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const angle = getCursorAngle(card, x, y);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    card.style.setProperty('--edge-proximity', `${(edge * 100).toFixed(3)}`);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    card.style.setProperty('--cursor-angle', `${angle.toFixed(3)}deg`);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, [getEdgeProximity, getCursorAngle]);
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
