src/components/Silk.tsx:const hexToNormalizedRGB = (hex: string) => {
src/components/Silk.tsx:  hex = hex.replace('#', '');
src/components/Silk.tsx:  return [
src/components/Silk.tsx:    parseInt(hex.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255,
src/components/Silk.tsx:    parseInt(hex.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255,
src/components/Silk.tsx:    parseInt(hex.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255
src/components/Silk.tsx:  ];
src/components/Silk.tsx:};
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:const vertexShader = `
src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec3 vPosition;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Silk.tsx:  vPosition = position;
src/components/Silk.tsx:  vUv = uv;
src/components/Silk.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
src/components/Silk.tsx:}
src/components/Silk.tsx:`;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:const fragmentShader = `
src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec3 vPosition;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform vec3  uColor;
src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uScale;
src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uRotation;
src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uNoiseIntensity;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:const float e = 2.71828182845904523536;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:float noise(vec2 texCoord) {
src/components/Silk.tsx:  float G = e;
src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec2  r = (G * sin(G * texCoord));
src/components/Silk.tsx:  return fract(r.x * r.y * (1.0 + texCoord.x));
src/components/Silk.tsx:}
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:vec2 rotateUvs(vec2 uv, float angle) {
src/components/Silk.tsx:  float c = cos(angle);
src/components/Silk.tsx:  float s = sin(angle);
src/components/Silk.tsx:  mat2  rot = mat2(c, -s, s, c);
src/components/Silk.tsx:  return rot * uv;
src/components/Silk.tsx:}
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:void main() {
src/components/Silk.tsx:  float rnd        = noise(gl_FragCoord.xy);
src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec2  uv         = rotateUvs(vUv * uScale, uRotation);
src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec2  tex        = uv * uScale;
src/components/Silk.tsx:  float tOffset    = uSpeed * uTime;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:  tex.y += 0.03 * sin(8.0 * tex.x - tOffset);
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:  float pattern = 0.6 +
src/components/Silk.tsx:                  0.4 * sin(5.0 * (tex.x + tex.y +
src/components/Silk.tsx:                                   cos(3.0 * tex.x + 5.0 * tex.y) +
src/components/Silk.tsx:                                   0.02 * tOffset) +
src/components/Silk.tsx:                           sin(20.0 * (tex.x + tex.y - 0.1 * tOffset)));
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec4 col = vec4(uColor, 1.0) * vec4(pattern) - rnd / 15.0 * uNoiseIntensity;
src/components/Silk.tsx:  col.a = 1.0;
src/components/Silk.tsx:  gl_FragColor = col;
src/components/Silk.tsx:}
src/components/Silk.tsx:`;
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:const SilkPlane = ({ uniforms }: { uniforms: any }) => {
src/components/Silk.tsx:  const ref = useRef<any>(null);
src/components/Silk.tsx:  const { viewport } = useThree();
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:  useLayoutEffect(() => {
src/components/Silk.tsx:    if (ref.current) {
src/components/Silk.tsx:      ref.current.scale.set(viewport.width, viewport.height, 1);
src/components/Silk.tsx:    }
src/components/Silk.tsx:  }, [viewport]);
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:  useFrame((_, delta) => {
src/components/Silk.tsx:    if (ref.current) {
src/components/Silk.tsx:      ref.current.material.uniforms.uTime.value += 0.1 * delta;
src/components/Silk.tsx:    }
src/components/Silk.tsx:  });
src/components/Silk.tsx:
src/components/Silk.tsx:  return (
src/components/Silk.tsx:    <mesh ref={ref}>
src/components/Silk.tsx:      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1, 1, 1]} />
src/components/Silk.tsx:      <shaderMaterial uniforms={uniforms} vertexShader={vertexShader} fragmentShader={fragmentShader} />
src/components/Silk.tsx:    </mesh>
src/components/Silk.tsx:  );
src/components/Silk.tsx:};
src/components/Silk.tsx:

src/components/Silk.tsx:  color?: string;

src/components/Silk.tsx:const Silk = ({ speed = 5, scale = 1, color = '#7B7481', noiseIntensity = 1.5, rotation = 0 }: SilkProps) => {

src/components/Silk.tsx:    () => ({

src/components/Silk.tsx:      uScale: { value: scale },
src/components/Silk.tsx:      uNoiseIntensity: { value: noiseIntensity },
src/components/Silk.tsx:      uColor: { value: new THREE.Color(...hexToNormalizedRGB(color)) },

src/components/Silk.tsx:      uTime: { value: 0 }
src/components/Silk.tsx:    }),

src/components/Silk.tsx:  );
src/components/Silk.tsx:

src/components/Silk.tsx:        <SilkPlane uniforms={uniforms} />

src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:import './ElectricBorder.css';
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:const ElectricBorder = ({
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  children,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  color = '#5227FF',
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  speed = 1,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  chaos = 0.12,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  borderRadius = 24,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  className,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  style
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:}: {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  children?: React.ReactNode,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  color?: string,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  speed?: number,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  chaos?: number,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  borderRadius?: number,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  className?: string,
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  style?: React.CSSProperties
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:}) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const animationRef = useRef<number>(0);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const timeRef = useRef(0);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const lastFrameTimeRef = useRef(0);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  // Noise functions
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const random = useCallback((x: number) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    return (Math.sin(x * 12.9898) * 43758.5453) % 1;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const noise2D = useCallback(
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    (x: number, y: number) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const i = Math.floor(x);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const j = Math.floor(y);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const fx = x - i;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const fy = y - j;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const a = random(i + j * 57);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const b = random(i + 1 + j * 57);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const c = random(i + (j + 1) * 57);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const d = random(i + 1 + (j + 1) * 57);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const ux = fx * fx * (3.0 - 2.0 * fx);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const uy = fy * fy * (3.0 - 2.0 * fy);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      return a * (1 - ux) * (1 - uy) + b * ux * (1 - uy) + c * (1 - ux) * uy + d * ux * uy;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    },
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    [random]
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  );
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const octavedNoise = useCallback(
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    (x: number, octaves: number, lacunarity: number, gain: number, baseAmplitude: number, baseFrequency: number, time: number, seed: number, baseFlatness: number) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let y = 0;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let amplitude = baseAmplitude;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let frequency = baseFrequency;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < octaves; i++) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        let octaveAmplitude = amplitude;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        if (i === 0) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:          octaveAmplitude *= baseFlatness;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        y += octaveAmplitude * noise2D(frequency * x + seed * 100, time * frequency * 0.3);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        frequency *= lacunarity;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        amplitude *= gain;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      return y;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    },
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    [noise2D]
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  );
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const getCornerPoint = useCallback((centerX: number, centerY: number, radius: number, startAngle: number, arcLength: number, progress: number) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const angle = startAngle + progress * arcLength;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    return {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      x: centerX + radius * Math.cos(angle),
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      y: centerY + radius * Math.sin(angle)
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const getRoundedRectPoint = useCallback(
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    (t: number, left: number, top: number, width: number, height: number, radius: number) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const straightWidth = width - 2 * radius;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const straightHeight = height - 2 * radius;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const cornerArc = (Math.PI * radius) / 2;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const totalPerimeter = 2 * straightWidth + 2 * straightHeight + 4 * cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const distance = t * totalPerimeter;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let accumulated = 0;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Top edge
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (distance <= accumulated + straightWidth) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / straightWidth;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return { x: left + radius + progress * straightWidth, y: top };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += straightWidth;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Top-right corner
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (distance <= accumulated + cornerArc) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return getCornerPoint(left + width - radius, top + radius, radius, -Math.PI / 2, Math.PI / 2, progress);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Right edge
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (distance <= accumulated + straightHeight) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / straightHeight;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return { x: left + width, y: top + radius + progress * straightHeight };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += straightHeight;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Bottom-right corner
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (distance <= accumulated + cornerArc) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return getCornerPoint(left + width - radius, top + height - radius, radius, 0, Math.PI / 2, progress);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Bottom edge
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (distance <= accumulated + straightWidth) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / straightWidth;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return { x: left + width - radius - progress * straightWidth, y: top + height };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += straightWidth;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Bottom-left corner
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (distance <= accumulated + cornerArc) {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return getCornerPoint(left + radius, top + height - radius, radius, Math.PI / 2, Math.PI / 2, progress);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Left edge

src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        const progress = (distance - accumulated) / straightHeight;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        return { x: left, y: top + height - radius - progress * straightHeight };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      accumulated += straightHeight;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Top-left corner
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const progress = (distance - accumulated) / cornerArc;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      return getCornerPoint(left + radius, top + radius, radius, Math.PI, Math.PI / 2, progress);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    },
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    [getCornerPoint]
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  );
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const container = containerRef.current;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    if (!canvas || !container) return;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    // Configuration
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const octaves = 10;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const lacunarity = 1.6;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const gain = 0.7;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const amplitude = chaos;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const frequency = 10;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const baseFlatness = 0;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const displacement = 60;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const borderOffset = 60;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const updateSize = () => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const width = rect.width + borderOffset * 2;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const height = rect.height + borderOffset * 2;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Use device pixel ratio for sharp rendering
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      canvas.width = width * dpr;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      canvas.height = height * dpr;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      canvas.style.width = `${width}px`;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      canvas.style.height = `${height}px`;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      return { width, height };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    };
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    let { width, height } = updateSize();
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const drawElectricBorder = (currentTime: number) => {
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      if (!canvas || !ctx) return;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const deltaTime = (currentTime - lastFrameTimeRef.current) / 1000;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      timeRef.current += deltaTime * speed;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      lastFrameTimeRef.current = currentTime;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      // Clear canvas
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.strokeStyle = color;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.lineCap = 'round';
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const scale = displacement;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const left = borderOffset;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const top = borderOffset;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const borderWidth = width - 2 * borderOffset;
src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const borderHeight = height - 2 * borderOffset;

src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    };

src/components/Particles.tsx:const hexToRgb = (hex: string) => {
src/components/Particles.tsx:  let cleanHex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');
src/components/Particles.tsx:  if (cleanHex.length === 3) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:    cleanHex = cleanHex
src/components/Particles.tsx:      .split('')
src/components/Particles.tsx:      .map(c => c + c)
src/components/Particles.tsx:      .join('');
src/components/Particles.tsx:  }
src/components/Particles.tsx:  const int = parseInt(cleanHex, 16);
src/components/Particles.tsx:  const r = ((int >> 16) & 255) / 255;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  const g = ((int >> 8) & 255) / 255;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  const b = (int & 255) / 255;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  return [r, g, b];
src/components/Particles.tsx:};
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:const vertex = /* glsl */ `
src/components/Particles.tsx:  attribute vec3 position;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  attribute vec4 random;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  attribute vec3 color;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform mat4 modelMatrix;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform mat4 viewMatrix;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform mat4 projectionMatrix;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform float uTime;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform float uSpread;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform float uBaseSize;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform float uSizeRandomness;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  
src/components/Particles.tsx:  varying vec4 vRandom;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  varying vec3 vColor;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  
src/components/Particles.tsx:  void main() {
src/components/Particles.tsx:    vRandom = random;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    vColor = color;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    
src/components/Particles.tsx:    vec3 pos = position * uSpread;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    pos.z *= 10.0;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    
src/components/Particles.tsx:    vec4 mPos = modelMatrix * vec4(pos, 1.0);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    float t = uTime;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    mPos.x += sin(t * random.z + 6.28 * random.w) * mix(0.1, 1.5, random.x);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    mPos.y += sin(t * random.y + 6.28 * random.x) * mix(0.1, 1.5, random.w);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    mPos.z += sin(t * random.w + 6.28 * random.y) * mix(0.1, 1.5, random.z);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    
src/components/Particles.tsx:    vec4 mvPos = viewMatrix * mPos;
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    if (uSizeRandomness == 0.0) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      gl_PointSize = uBaseSize;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    } else {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      gl_PointSize = (uBaseSize * (1.0 + uSizeRandomness * (random.x - 0.5))) / length(mvPos.xyz);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    }
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    gl_Position = projectionMatrix * mvPos;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  }
src/components/Particles.tsx:`;
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:const fragment = /* glsl */ `
src/components/Particles.tsx:  precision highp float;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform float uTime;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  uniform float uAlphaParticles;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  varying vec4 vRandom;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  varying vec3 vColor;
src/components/Particles.tsx:  
src/components/Particles.tsx:  void main() {
src/components/Particles.tsx:    vec2 uv = gl_PointCoord.xy;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    float d = length(uv - vec2(0.5));
src/components/Particles.tsx:    
src/components/Particles.tsx:    if(uAlphaParticles < 0.5) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      if(d > 0.5) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        discard;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      }
src/components/Particles.tsx:      gl_FragColor = vec4(vColor + 0.2 * sin(uv.yxx + uTime + vRandom.y * 6.28), 1.0);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    } else {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      float circle = smoothstep(0.5, 0.4, d) * 0.8;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      gl_FragColor = vec4(vColor + 0.2 * sin(uv.yxx + uTime + vRandom.y * 6.28), circle);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    }
src/components/Particles.tsx:  }

src/components/Particles.tsx:    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
src/components/Particles.tsx:      const x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      const y = -(((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 - 1);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      mouseRef.current = { x, y };
src/components/Particles.tsx:    };
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    if (moveParticlesOnHover) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    }
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const count = particleCount;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const positions = new Float32Array(count * 3);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const randoms = new Float32Array(count * 4);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const colors = new Float32Array(count * 3);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const palette = particleColors && particleColors.length > 0 ? particleColors : defaultColors;
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      let x, y, z, len;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      do {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        x = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        y = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        z = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        len = x * x + y * y + z * z;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      } while (len > 1 || len === 0);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      const r = Math.cbrt(Math.random());
src/components/Particles.tsx:      positions.set([x * r, y * r, z * r], i * 3);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      randoms.set([Math.random(), Math.random(), Math.random(), Math.random()], i * 4);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      const col = hexToRgb(palette[Math.floor(Math.random() * palette.length)]);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      colors.set(col, i * 3);
src/components/Particles.tsx:    }
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const geometry = new Geometry(gl, {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      position: { size: 3, data: positions },
src/components/Particles.tsx:      random: { size: 4, data: randoms },
src/components/Particles.tsx:      color: { size: 3, data: colors }
src/components/Particles.tsx:    });
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const program = new Program(gl, {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      vertex,
src/components/Particles.tsx:      fragment,
src/components/Particles.tsx:      uniforms: {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        uTime: { value: 0 },
src/components/Particles.tsx:        uSpread: { value: particleSpread },
src/components/Particles.tsx:        uBaseSize: { value: particleBaseSize * pixelRatio },
src/components/Particles.tsx:        uSizeRandomness: { value: sizeRandomness },
src/components/Particles.tsx:        uAlphaParticles: { value: alphaParticles ? 1 : 0 }
src/components/Particles.tsx:      },
src/components/Particles.tsx:      transparent: true,
src/components/Particles.tsx:      depthTest: false
src/components/Particles.tsx:    });
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const particles = new Mesh(gl, { mode: gl.POINTS, geometry, program });
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    let animationFrameId: number;
src/components/Particles.tsx:    let lastTime = performance.now();
src/components/Particles.tsx:    let elapsed = 0;
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    const update = (t: number) => {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      const delta = t - lastTime;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      lastTime = t;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      elapsed += delta * speed;
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:      program.uniforms.uTime.value = elapsed * 0.001;
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:      if (moveParticlesOnHover) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.position.x = -mouseRef.current.x * particleHoverFactor;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.position.y = -mouseRef.current.y * particleHoverFactor;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.position.x = 0;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.position.y = 0;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      }
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:      if (!disableRotation) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.rotation.x = Math.sin(elapsed * 0.0002) * 0.1;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.rotation.y = Math.cos(elapsed * 0.0005) * 0.15;
src/components/Particles.tsx:        particles.rotation.z += 0.01 * speed;
src/components/Particles.tsx:      }
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:      renderer.render({ scene: particles, camera });
src/components/Particles.tsx:    };
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
src/components/Particles.tsx:
src/components/Particles.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/Particles.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', resize);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      if (moveParticlesOnHover) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      }
src/components/Particles.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      if (container.contains(gl.canvas)) {
src/components/Particles.tsx:        container.removeChild(gl.canvas);
src/components/Particles.tsx:      }
src/components/Particles.tsx:    };
src/components/Particles.tsx:    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
src/components/Particles.tsx:  }, [
src/components/Particles.tsx:    particleCount,
src/components/Particles.tsx:    particleSpread,
src/components/Particles.tsx:    speed,
src/components/Particles.tsx:    moveParticlesOnHover,
src/components/Particles.tsx:    particleHoverFactor,
src/components/Particles.tsx:    alphaParticles,

src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:const vertexShader = `#version 300 es
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:in vec2 position;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:in vec2 uv;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:out vec2 vUv;

src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:`;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:const fragmentShader = `#version 300 es
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:precision highp float;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:precision highp int;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:out vec4 fragColor;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform vec2  uResolution;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform float uTime;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform float uIntensity;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform int   uAnimType;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform vec2  uMouse;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform int   uColorCount;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform float uDistort;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform vec2  uOffset;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform sampler2D uGradient;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform float uNoiseAmount;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:uniform int   uRayCount;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:float hash21(vec2 p){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    p = floor(p);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float f = 52.9829189 * fract(dot(p, vec2(0.065, 0.005)));
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return fract(f);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:mat2 rot30(){ return mat2(0.8, -0.5, 0.5, 0.8); }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:float layeredNoise(vec2 fragPx){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec2 p = mod(fragPx + vec2(uTime * 30.0, -uTime * 21.0), 1024.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec2 q = rot30() * p;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float n = 0.0;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    n += 0.40 * hash21(q);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    n += 0.25 * hash21(q * 2.0 + 17.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    n += 0.20 * hash21(q * 4.0 + 47.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    n += 0.10 * hash21(q * 8.0 + 113.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    n += 0.05 * hash21(q * 16.0 + 191.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return n;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:vec3 rayDir(vec2 frag, vec2 res, vec2 offset, float dist){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float focal = res.y * max(dist, 1e-3);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return normalize(vec3(2.0 * (frag - offset) - res, focal));
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:float edgeFade(vec2 frag, vec2 res, vec2 offset){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec2 toC = frag - 0.5 * res - offset;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float r = length(toC) / (0.5 * min(res.x, res.y));
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float x = clamp(r, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float q = x * x * x * (x * (x * 6.0 - 15.0) + 10.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float s = q * 0.5;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    s = pow(s, 1.5);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float tail = 1.0 - pow(1.0 - s, 2.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    s = mix(s, tail, 0.2);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float dn = (layeredNoise(frag * 0.15) - 0.5) * 0.0015 * s;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return clamp(s + dn, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:mat3 rotX(float a){ float c = cos(a), s = sin(a); return mat3(1.0,0.0,0.0, 0.0,c,-s, 0.0,s,c); }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:mat3 rotY(float a){ float c = cos(a), s = sin(a); return mat3(c,0.0,s, 0.0,1.0,0.0, -s,0.0,c); }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:mat3 rotZ(float a){ float c = cos(a), s = sin(a); return mat3(c,-s,0.0, s,c,0.0, 0.0,0.0,1.0); }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:vec3 sampleGradient(float t){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    t = clamp(t, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return texture(uGradient, vec2(t, 0.5)).rgb;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:vec2 rot2(vec2 v, float a){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float s = sin(a), c = cos(a);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return mat2(c, -s, s, c) * v;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:float bendAngle(vec3 q, float t){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float a = 0.8 * sin(q.x * 0.55 + t * 0.6)
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            + 0.7 * sin(q.y * 0.50 - t * 0.5)
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            + 0.6 * sin(q.z * 0.60 + t * 0.7);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    return a;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:void main(){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec2 frag = gl_FragCoord.xy;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float t = uTime * uSpeed;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float jitterAmp = 0.1 * clamp(uNoiseAmount, 0.0, 1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec3 dir = rayDir(frag, uResolution, uOffset, 1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float marchT = 0.0;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float n = layeredNoise(frag);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    vec4 c = cos(t * 0.2 + vec4(0.0, 33.0, 11.0, 0.0));
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    mat2 M2 = mat2(c.x, c.y, c.z, c.w);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    float amp = clamp(uDistort, 0.0, 50.0) * 0.15;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    mat3 rot3dMat = mat3(1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    if(uAnimType == 1){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      vec3 ang = vec3(t * 0.31, t * 0.21, t * 0.17);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      rot3dMat = rotZ(ang.z) * rotY(ang.y) * rotX(ang.x);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    mat3 hoverMat = mat3(1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    if(uAnimType == 2){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      vec2 m = uMouse * 2.0 - 1.0;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      vec3 ang = vec3(m.y * 0.6, m.x * 0.6, 0.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      hoverMat = rotY(ang.y) * rotX(ang.x);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    for (int i = 0; i < 44; ++i) {
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 P = marchT * dir;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        P.z -= 2.0;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float rad = length(P);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 Pl = P * (10.0 / max(rad, 1e-6));
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        if(uAnimType == 0){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            Pl.xz *= M2;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        } else if(uAnimType == 1){
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      Pl = rot3dMat * Pl;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        } else {
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      Pl = hoverMat * Pl;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float stepLen = min(rad - 0.3, n * jitterAmp) + 0.1;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float grow = smoothstep(0.35, 3.0, marchT);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float a1 = amp * grow * bendAngle(Pl * 0.6, t);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float a2 = 0.5 * amp * grow * bendAngle(Pl.zyx * 0.5 + 3.1, t * 0.9);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 Pb = Pl;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        Pb.xz = rot2(Pb.xz, a1);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        Pb.xy = rot2(Pb.xy, a2);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float rayPattern = smoothstep(
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            0.5, 0.7,
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            sin(Pb.x + cos(Pb.y) * cos(Pb.z)) *
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            sin(Pb.z + sin(Pb.y) * cos(Pb.x + t))
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        );
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        if (uRayCount > 0) {
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            float ang = atan(Pb.y, Pb.x);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            float comb = 0.5 + 0.5 * cos(float(uRayCount) * ang);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            comb = pow(comb, 3.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            rayPattern *= smoothstep(0.15, 0.95, comb);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 spectralDefault = 1.0 + vec3(
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            cos(marchT * 3.0 + 0.0),
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            cos(marchT * 3.0 + 1.0),
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:            cos(marchT * 3.0 + 2.0)
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        );
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float saw = fract(marchT * 0.25);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        float tRay = saw * saw * (3.0 - 2.0 * saw);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 userGradient = 2.0 * sampleGradient(tRay);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 spectral = (uColorCount > 0) ? userGradient : spectralDefault;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        vec3 base = (0.05 / (0.4 + stepLen))
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:                  * smoothstep(5.0, 0.0, rad)
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:                  * spectral;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        col += base * rayPattern;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:        marchT += stepLen;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    col *= edgeFade(frag, uResolution, uOffset);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    col *= uIntensity;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    fragColor = vec4(clamp(col, 0.0, 1.0), 1.0);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:}`;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:const hexToRgb01 = (hex: string) => {
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  let h = hex.trim();
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  if (h.startsWith('#')) h = h.slice(1);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  if (h.length === 3) {
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    const r = h[0],
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      g = h[1],
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:      b = h[2];
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:    h = r + r + g + g + b + b;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  }
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  const intVal = parseInt(h, 16);
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  if (isNaN(intVal) || (h.length !== 6 && h.length !== 8)) return [1, 1, 1];
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  const r = ((intVal >> 16) & 255) / 255;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  const g = ((intVal >> 8) & 255) / 255;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  const b = (intVal & 255) / 255;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  return [r, g, b];
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:};
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:const toPx = (v: any) => {
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  if (v == null) return 0;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  if (typeof v === 'number') return v;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  const s = String(v).trim();
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  const num = parseFloat(s.replace('px', ''));
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:  return isNaN(num) ? 0 : num;
src/components/PrismaticBurst.tsx:};

src/components/PrivacyModal.tsx:              <p>IntelliFlow 采用严格的<strong>“阅后即焚 (Ephemeral Storage)”</strong>架构处理您的业务数据：</p>
src/components/PrivacyModal.tsx:              <ul>
src/components/PrivacyModal.tsx:                <li><strong>瞬时内存处理</strong>：您上传用于节点测试或业务运行的原始文件（如 PDF 扫描件、发票、报名表等），系统仅在内存中进行 OCR 剥离与特征提取。</li>

src/components/PrivacyModal.tsx:                <li><strong>沙箱隔离</strong>：我们从底层物理分离了系统指令区与外部用户数据流，确保数据在严格的沙箱环境中处理，阻断数据横向越权。</li>

src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, ReactNode } from 'react';
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:interface ModalContextType {
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  isLoginModalOpen: boolean;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  openLoginModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  closeLoginModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  isWaitlistModalOpen: boolean;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  openWaitlistModal: (title?: string) => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  closeWaitlistModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  waitlistTitle?: string;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  isStealthModalOpen: boolean;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  openStealthModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  closeStealthModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  isPrivacyModalOpen: boolean;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  openPrivacyModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  closePrivacyModal: () => void;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:}
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:const ModalContext = createContext<ModalContextType | undefined>(undefined);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:export function ModalProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  const [isLoginModalOpen, setIsLoginModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  const [isWaitlistModalOpen, setIsWaitlistModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  const [waitlistTitle, setWaitlistTitle] = useState<string | undefined>(undefined);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  const [isStealthModalOpen, setIsStealthModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  const [isPrivacyModalOpen, setIsPrivacyModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  return (
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:    <ModalContext.Provider
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:      value={{
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        isLoginModalOpen,
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        openLoginModal: () => setIsLoginModalOpen(true),
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        closeLoginModal: () => setIsLoginModalOpen(false),
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        isWaitlistModalOpen,
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        openWaitlistModal: (title?: string) => {
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:          setWaitlistTitle(title);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:          setIsWaitlistModalOpen(true);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        },
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        closeWaitlistModal: () => {
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:          setIsWaitlistModalOpen(false);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:          setWaitlistTitle(undefined);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        },
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        waitlistTitle,
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        isStealthModalOpen,
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        openStealthModal: () => setIsStealthModalOpen(true),
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        closeStealthModal: () => setIsStealthModalOpen(false),
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        isPrivacyModalOpen,
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        openPrivacyModal: () => setIsPrivacyModalOpen(true),
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:        closePrivacyModal: () => setIsPrivacyModalOpen(false),
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:      }}
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:    >
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:      {children}
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:    </ModalContext.Provider>
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  );
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:}
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:export function useModals() {
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  const context = useContext(ModalContext);
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  if (context === undefined) {
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:    throw new Error('useModals must be used within a ModalProvider');
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  }
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:  return context;
src/contexts/ModalContext.tsx:}

src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:export function LanguageProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<Language>('zh');
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:    document.documentElement.lang = language === 'zh' ? 'zh-CN' : 'en';
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  }, [language]);
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  const t = (key: string) => {
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:    return translations[language][key] || key;
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  };
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  return (
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:    <LanguageContext.Provider value={{ language, setLanguage, t }}>
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:      {children}
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:    </LanguageContext.Provider>
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  );
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:}
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:export function useLanguage() {
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  const context = useContext(LanguageContext);
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  if (context === undefined) {
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:    throw new Error('useLanguage must be used within a LanguageProvider');
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  }
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:  return context;
src/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx:}

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    gl.clearColor(1, 1, 1, 1);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const vertexShader = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      attribute vec2 position;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      attribute vec2 uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        vUv = uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        gl_Position = vec4(position, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    `;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const fragmentShader = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      precision highp float;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform vec3 uResolution;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform vec3 uBaseColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uAmplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uFrequencyX;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform float uFrequencyY;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniform vec2 uMouse;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      vec4 renderImage(vec2 uvCoord) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec2 fragCoord = uvCoord * uResolution.xy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec2 uv = (2.0 * fragCoord - uResolution.xy) / min(uResolution.x, uResolution.y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          for (float i = 1.0; i < 10.0; i++){
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              uv.x += uAmplitude / i * cos(i * uFrequencyX * uv.y + uTime + uMouse.x * 3.14159);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              uv.y += uAmplitude / i * cos(i * uFrequencyY * uv.x + uTime + uMouse.y * 3.14159);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec2 diff = (uvCoord - uMouse);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          float dist = length(diff);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          float falloff = exp(-dist * 20.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          float ripple = sin(10.0 * dist - uTime * 2.0) * 0.03;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          uv += (diff / (dist + 0.0001)) * ripple * falloff;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec3 color = uBaseColor / abs(sin(uTime - uv.y - uv.x));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          return vec4(color, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          vec4 col = vec4(0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          int samples = 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          for (int i = -1; i <= 1; i++){
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              for (int j = -1; j <= 1; j++){
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:                  vec2 offset = vec2(float(i), float(j)) * (1.0 / min(uResolution.x, uResolution.y));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:                  col += renderImage(vUv + offset);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:                  samples++;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:              }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:          gl_FragColor = col / float(samples);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    `;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const geometry = new Triangle(gl);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:    const program = new Program(gl, {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      fragment: fragmentShader,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:      uniforms: {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        },

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/LiquidChrome.tsx:        uAmplitude: { value: amplitude },

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/DotField.tsx:        } else if (isBulge) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:const VERT = `#version 300 es
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:in vec2 position;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 0.0, 1.0);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:const FRAG = `#version 300 es
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:precision highp float;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform float uTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform float uAmplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform vec3 uColorStops[3];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform vec2 uResolution;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:uniform float uBlend;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:out vec4 fragColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:vec3 permute(vec3 x) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  return mod(((x * 34.0) + 1.0) * x, 289.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:float snoise(vec2 v){
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  const vec4 C = vec4(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      0.211324865405187, 0.366025403784439,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      -0.577350269189626, 0.024390243902439
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  );
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 i  = floor(v + dot(v, C.yy));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 x0 = v - i + dot(i, C.xx);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 i1 = (x0.x > x0.y) ? vec2(1.0, 0.0) : vec2(0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec4 x12 = x0.xyxy + C.xxzz;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  x12.xy -= i1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  i = mod(i, 289.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 p = permute(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      permute(i.y + vec3(0.0, i1.y, 1.0))
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:    + i.x + vec3(0.0, i1.x, 1.0)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  );
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 m = max(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      0.5 - vec3(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:          dot(x0, x0),
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:          dot(x12.xy, x12.xy),
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:          dot(x12.zw, x12.zw)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      ), 
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      0.0
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  );
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  m = m * m;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  m = m * m;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 x = 2.0 * fract(p * C.www) - 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 h = abs(x) - 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 ox = floor(x + 0.5);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 a0 = x - ox;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  m *= 1.79284291400159 - 0.85373472095314 * (a0*a0 + h*h);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 g;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  g.x  = a0.x  * x0.x  + h.x  * x0.y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  g.yz = a0.yz * x12.xz + h.yz * x12.yw;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  return 130.0 * dot(m, g);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:struct ColorStop {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 color;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float position;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:};
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:#define COLOR_RAMP(colors, factor, finalColor) {              \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  int index = 0;                                            \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {                               \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:     ColorStop currentColor = colors[i];                    \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:     bool isInBetween = currentColor.position <= factor;    \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:     index = int(mix(float(index), float(i), float(isInBetween))); \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  }                                                         \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  ColorStop currentColor = colors[index];                   \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  ColorStop nextColor = colors[index + 1];                  \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float range = nextColor.position - currentColor.position; \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float lerpFactor = (factor - currentColor.position) / range; \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  finalColor = mix(currentColor.color, nextColor.color, lerpFactor); \\
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec2 uv = gl_FragCoord.xy / uResolution;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  ColorStop colors[3];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  colors[0] = ColorStop(uColorStops[0], 0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  colors[1] = ColorStop(uColorStops[1], 0.5);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  colors[2] = ColorStop(uColorStops[2], 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 rampColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  COLOR_RAMP(colors, uv.x, rampColor);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float height = snoise(vec2(uv.x * 2.0 + uTime * 0.1, uTime * 0.25)) * 0.5 * uAmplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  height = exp(height);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  height = (uv.y * 2.0 - height + 0.2);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float intensity = 0.6 * height;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float midPoint = 0.20;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  float auroraAlpha = smoothstep(midPoint - uBlend * 0.5, midPoint + uBlend * 0.5, intensity);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  vec3 auroraColor = intensity * rampColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:  fragColor = vec4(auroraColor * auroraAlpha, auroraAlpha);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:`;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:        return [c.r, c.g, c.b];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      });
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:      renderer.render({ scene: mesh });
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:    };

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Aurora.tsx:

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:vec3 gradientHash(vec3 p) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  p = vec3(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    dot(p, vec3(127.1, 311.7, 234.6)),
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    dot(p, vec3(269.5, 183.3, 198.3)),
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    dot(p, vec3(169.5, 283.3, 156.9))
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  );
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 h = fract(sin(p) * 43758.5453123);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float phi = acos(2.0 * h.x - 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float theta = TAU * h.y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return vec3(cos(theta) * sin(phi), sin(theta) * cos(phi), cos(phi));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float t3 = t * t2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return 6.0 * t3 * t2 - 15.0 * t2 * t2 + 10.0 * t3;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:float perlin3D(float amplitude, float frequency, float px, float py, float pz) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float fx = floor(x); float fy = floor(y); float fz = floor(pz);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float cx = ceil(x);  float cy = ceil(y);  float cz = ceil(pz);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g000 = gradientHash(vec3(fx, fy, fz));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g100 = gradientHash(vec3(cx, fy, fz));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  vec3 g010 = gradientHash(vec3(fx, cy, fz));

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:float auroraGlow(float t, vec2 shift) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  for (float i = 0.0; i < 3.0; i += 1.0) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    amp *= uOctaveDecay;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:    freq *= 2.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  float yBand = uv.y * 10.0 - uBandHeight * 10.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SoftAurora.tsx:  return 0.3 * max(exp(uBandSpread * (1.0 - 1.1 * abs(noiseVal + yBand))), 0.0);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    float phase = scanPhase;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    if (uScanDirection > 0.5 && uScanDirection < 1.5) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:      phase = 1.0 - phase;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    } else if (uScanDirection > 1.5) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:function smoothDampVec2(current: any, target: any, currentVelocity: any, smoothTime: any, maxSpeed: any, deltaTime: any) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const out = current.clone();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  smoothTime = Math.max(0.0001, smoothTime);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const omega = 2 / smoothTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const x = omega * deltaTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const exp = 1 / (1 + x + 0.48 * x * x + 0.235 * x * x * x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let change = current.clone().sub(target);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const originalTo = target.clone();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const maxChange = maxSpeed * smoothTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (change.length() > maxChange) change.setLength(maxChange);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  target = current.clone().sub(change);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const temp = currentVelocity.clone().addScaledVector(change, omega).multiplyScalar(deltaTime);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  currentVelocity.sub(temp.clone().multiplyScalar(omega));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  currentVelocity.multiplyScalar(exp);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  out.copy(target.clone().add(change.add(temp).multiplyScalar(exp)));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const origMinusCurrent = originalTo.clone().sub(current);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const outMinusOrig = out.clone().sub(originalTo);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (origMinusCurrent.dot(outMinusOrig) > 0) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    out.copy(originalTo);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    currentVelocity.set(0, 0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return out;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:function smoothDampFloat(current: any, target: any, velRef: any, smoothTime: any, maxSpeed: any, deltaTime: any) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  smoothTime = Math.max(0.0001, smoothTime);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const omega = 2 / smoothTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const x = omega * deltaTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const exp = 1 / (1 + x + 0.48 * x * x + 0.235 * x * x * x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let change = current - target;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const originalTo = target;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const maxChange = maxSpeed * smoothTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  change = Math.sign(change) * Math.min(Math.abs(change), maxChange);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  target = current - change;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const temp = (velRef.v + omega * change) * deltaTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  velRef.v = (velRef.v - omega * temp) * exp;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let out = target + (change + temp) * exp;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const origMinusCurrent = originalTo - current;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const outMinusOrig = out - originalTo;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (origMinusCurrent * outMinusOrig > 0) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    out = originalTo;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    velRef.v = 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return { value: out, v: velRef.v };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:function medianPush(buf: any[], v: any, maxLen: number) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  buf.push(v);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (buf.length > maxLen) buf.shift();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:function median(buf: any[]) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  if (buf.length === 0) return 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const a = [...buf].sort((x, y) => x - y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const mid = Math.floor(a.length / 2);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return a.length % 2 ? a[mid] : (a[mid - 1] + a[mid]) * 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:function centroid(points: any[]) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  let x = 0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    y = 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  const n = points.length || 1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  for (const p of points) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    x += p.x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:    y += p.y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return { x: x / n, y: y / n };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:function dist2(a: any, b: any) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.y - b.y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/GridScan.tsx:}

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:const fragmentShader = `

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:#define MAT45 mat2(0.7071, -0.7071, 0.7071, 0.7071)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:#define PERIOD 3.0
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float Hash21(vec2 p) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  p = fract(p * vec2(123.34, 456.21));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  p += dot(p, p + 45.32);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return fract(p.x * p.y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float tri(float x) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return abs(fract(x) * 2.0 - 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float tris(float x) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float t = fract(x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, abs(2.0 * t - 1.0));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float trisn(float x) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float t = fract(x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return 2.0 * (1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, abs(2.0 * t - 1.0))) - 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:vec3 hsv2rgb(vec3 c) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec4 K = vec4(1.0, 2.0 / 3.0, 1.0 / 3.0, 3.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec3 p = abs(fract(c.xxx + K.xyz) * 6.0 - K.www);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return c.z * mix(K.xxx, clamp(p - K.xxx, 0.0, 1.0), c.y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:float Star(vec2 uv, float flare) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float d = length(uv);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float m = (0.05 * uGlowIntensity) / d;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  float rays = smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, 1.0 - abs(uv.x * uv.y * 1000.0));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  m += rays * flare * uGlowIntensity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  uv *= MAT45;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  rays = smoothstep(0.0, 1.0, 1.0 - abs(uv.x * uv.y * 1000.0));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  m += rays * 0.3 * flare * uGlowIntensity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  m *= smoothstep(1.0, 0.2, d);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  return m;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:vec3 StarLayer(vec2 uv) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 gv = fract(uv) - 0.5; 
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  vec2 id = floor(uv);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:  for (int y = -1; y <= 1; y++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:    for (int x = -1; x <= 1; x++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec2 offset = vec2(float(x), float(y));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec2 si = id + vec2(float(x), float(y));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float seed = Hash21(si);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float size = fract(seed * 345.32);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float glossLocal = tri(uStarSpeed / (PERIOD * seed + 1.0));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float flareSize = smoothstep(0.9, 1.0, size) * glossLocal;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float red = smoothstep(STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF, 1.0, Hash21(si + 1.0)) + STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float blu = smoothstep(STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF, 1.0, Hash21(si + 3.0)) + STAR_COLOR_CUTOFF;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float grn = min(red, blu) * seed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec3 base = vec3(red, grn, blu);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float hue = atan(base.g - base.r, base.b - base.r) / (2.0 * 3.14159) + 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      hue = fract(hue + uHueShift / 360.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float sat = length(base - vec3(dot(base, vec3(0.299, 0.587, 0.114)))) * uSaturation;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      float val = max(max(base.r, base.g), base.b);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      base = hsv2rgb(vec3(hue, sat, val));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Galaxy.tsx:      vec2 pad = vec2(tris(seed * 34.0 + uTime * uSpeed / 10.0), tris(seed * 38.0 + uTime * uSpeed / 30.0)) - 0.5;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:export function HLSVideo({ src, ...props }: HLSVideoProps) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:    } else if (video.canPlayType('application/vnd.apple.mpegurl')) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:      // For Safari which has native HLS support
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:      video.src = src;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/luxury/HLSVideo.tsx:    return () => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function getWebGLContext(canvas) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const params = {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        alpha: true,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        depth: false,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        stencil: false,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        antialias: false,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        preserveDrawingBuffer: false
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let gl = canvas.getContext('webgl2', params);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const isWebGL2 = !!gl;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!isWebGL2) gl = canvas.getContext('webgl', params) || canvas.getContext('experimental-webgl', params);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!gl) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let halfFloat;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let supportLinearFiltering;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (isWebGL2) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        gl.getExtension('EXT_color_buffer_float');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        supportLinearFiltering = gl.getExtension('OES_texture_float_linear');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      } else {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        halfFloat = gl.getExtension('OES_texture_half_float');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        supportLinearFiltering = gl.getExtension('OES_texture_half_float_linear');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.clearColor(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const halfFloatTexType = isWebGL2 ? gl.HALF_FLOAT : halfFloat && halfFloat.HALF_FLOAT_OES;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let formatRGBA;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let formatRG;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let formatR;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (isWebGL2) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        formatRGBA = getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RGBA16F, gl.RGBA, halfFloatTexType);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        formatRG = getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RG16F, gl.RG, halfFloatTexType);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      } else {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        formatRGBA = getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RGBA, gl.RGBA, halfFloatTexType);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        formatRG = getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RGBA, gl.RGBA, halfFloatTexType);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        formatR = getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RGBA, gl.RGBA, halfFloatTexType);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        ext: {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          formatRGBA,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          formatRG,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          formatR,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          halfFloatTexType,

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function getSupportedFormat(gl, internalFormat, format, type) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!internalFormat || !supportRenderTextureFormat(gl, internalFormat, format, type)) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        switch (internalFormat) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          case gl.R16F:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            return getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RG16F, gl.RG, type);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          case gl.RG16F:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            return getSupportedFormat(gl, gl.RGBA16F, gl.RGBA, type);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          default:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            return null;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return { internalFormat, format };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function supportRenderTextureFormat(gl, internalFormat, format, type) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const texture = gl.createTexture();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.bindTexture(gl.TEXTURE_2D, texture);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_MIN_FILTER, gl.NEAREST);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_MAG_FILTER, gl.NEAREST);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_WRAP_S, gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_WRAP_T, gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
