forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const fbo = gl.createFramebuffer();

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform vec2 point;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            p.x *= aspectRatio;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(base + splat, 1.0);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp float;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float dissipation;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        vec4 bilerp (sampler2D sam, vec2 uv, vec2 tsize) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 st = uv / tsize - 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 iuv = floor(st);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 fuv = fract(st);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 a = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(0.5, 0.5)) * tsize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 b = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(1.5, 0.5)) * tsize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 c = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(0.5, 1.5)) * tsize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec4 d = texture2D(sam, (iuv + vec2(1.5, 1.5)) * tsize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            return mix(mix(a, b, fuv.x), mix(c, d, fuv.x), fuv.y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:                vec4 result = bilerp(uSource, coord, dyeTexelSize);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:                vec4 result = texture2D(uSource, coord);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            #endif
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float decay = 1.0 + dissipation * dt;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = result / decay;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `,

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump float;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump sampler2D;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vUv;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vR;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vT;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vB;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float L = texture2D(uVelocity, vL).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float R = texture2D(uVelocity, vR).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float T = texture2D(uVelocity, vT).y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float B = texture2D(uVelocity, vB).y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 C = texture2D(uVelocity, vUv).xy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vL.x < 0.0) { L = -C.x; }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vR.x > 1.0) { R = -C.x; }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vT.y > 1.0) { T = -C.y; }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            if (vB.y < 0.0) { B = -C.y; }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float div = 0.5 * (R - L + T - B);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(div, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump float;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision mediump sampler2D;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vL;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vR;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vT;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying highp vec2 vB;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float L = texture2D(uVelocity, vL).y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float R = texture2D(uVelocity, vR).y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float T = texture2D(uVelocity, vT).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float B = texture2D(uVelocity, vB).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float vorticity = R - L - T + B;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(0.5 * vorticity, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    );

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    const vorticityShader = compileShader(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp float;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        precision highp sampler2D;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vL;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vR;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vT;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        varying vec2 vB;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uVelocity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform sampler2D uCurl;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float curl;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        uniform float dt;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        void main () {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float L = texture2D(uCurl, vL).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float R = texture2D(uCurl, vR).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float T = texture2D(uCurl, vT).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float B = texture2D(uCurl, vB).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            float C = texture2D(uCurl, vUv).x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 force = 0.5 * vec2(abs(T) - abs(B), abs(R) - abs(L));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            force /= length(force) + 0.0001;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            force *= curl * C;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            force.y *= -1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            vec2 velocity = texture2D(uVelocity, vUv).xy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            velocity += force * dt;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            velocity = min(max(velocity, -1000.0), 1000.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(velocity, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      `

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function createFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.activeTexture(gl.TEXTURE0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let texture = gl.createTexture();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.bindTexture(gl.TEXTURE_2D, texture);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_MIN_FILTER, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_MAG_FILTER, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_WRAP_S, gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texParameteri(gl.TEXTURE_2D, gl.TEXTURE_WRAP_T, gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.texImage2D(gl.TEXTURE_2D, 0, internalFormat, w, h, 0, format, type, null);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let fbo = gl.createFramebuffer();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.bindFramebuffer(gl.FRAMEBUFFER, fbo);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.framebufferTexture2D(gl.FRAMEBUFFER, gl.COLOR_ATTACHMENT0, gl.TEXTURE_2D, texture, 0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.viewport(0, 0, w, h);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.clear(gl.COLOR_BUFFER_BIT);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let texelSizeX = 1.0 / w;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let texelSizeY = 1.0 / h;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        texture,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        fbo,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        width: w,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        height: h,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        texelSizeX,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        texelSizeY,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        attach(id) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          gl.activeTexture(gl.TEXTURE0 + id);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          gl.bindTexture(gl.TEXTURE_2D, texture);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          return id;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function createDoubleFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let fbo1 = createFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let fbo2 = createFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        width: w,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        height: h,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        texelSizeX: fbo1.texelSizeX,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        texelSizeY: fbo1.texelSizeY,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        get read() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          return fbo1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        set read(value) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          fbo1 = value;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        get write() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          return fbo2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        set write(value) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          fbo2 = value;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        swap() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          let temp = fbo1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          fbo1 = fbo2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          fbo2 = temp;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function resizeFBO(target, w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let newFBO = createFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      copyProgram.bind();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(copyProgram.uniforms.uTexture, target.attach(0));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      blit(newFBO);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return newFBO;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function resizeDoubleFBO(target, w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (target.width === w && target.height === h) return target;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      target.read = resizeFBO(target.read, w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      target.write = createFBO(w, h, internalFormat, format, type, param);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      target.width = w;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      target.height = h;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      target.texelSizeX = 1.0 / w;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      target.texelSizeY = 1.0 / h;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return target;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function splat(x, y, dx, dy, color) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      splatProgram.bind();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      gl.uniform1i(splatProgram.uniforms.uTarget, velocity.read.attach(0));

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      dye.swap();

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function correctRadius(radius) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return radius;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function updatePointerDownData(pointer, id, posX, posY) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function updatePointerMoveData(pointer, posX, posY, color) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.prevTexcoordY = pointer.texcoordY;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.moved = Math.abs(pointer.deltaX) > 0 || Math.abs(pointer.deltaY) > 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      pointer.color = color;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function correctDeltaY(delta) {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function hexToRGB(hex) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let val = hex.replace('#', '');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (val.length === 3) val = val[0] + val[0] + val[1] + val[1] + val[2] + val[2];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const r = parseInt(val.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const g = parseInt(val.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const b = parseInt(val.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return { r: r * 0.15, g: g * 0.15, b: b * 0.15 };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function generateColor() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (!config.RAINBOW_MODE) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        return hexToRGB(config.COLOR);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let c = HSVtoRGB(Math.random(), 1.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      c.r *= 0.15;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      c.g *= 0.15;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      c.b *= 0.15;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return c;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function HSVtoRGB(h, s, v) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let r, g, b, i, f, p, q, t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      i = Math.floor(h * 6);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      f = h * 6 - i;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      p = v * (1 - s);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      q = v * (1 - f * s);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      t = v * (1 - (1 - f) * s);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      switch (i % 6) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 0:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = v;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = p;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 1:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = q;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = v;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = p;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 2:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = p;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = v;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          break;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        case 3:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          r = p;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          g = q;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:          b = v;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function wrap(value, min, max) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const range = max - min;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (range === 0) return min;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return ((value - min) % range) + min;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function getResolution(resolution) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let aspectRatio = gl.drawingBufferWidth / gl.drawingBufferHeight;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (aspectRatio < 1) aspectRatio = 1.0 / aspectRatio;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const min = Math.round(resolution);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const max = Math.round(resolution * aspectRatio);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (gl.drawingBufferWidth > gl.drawingBufferHeight) return { width: max, height: min };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      else return { width: min, height: max };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function scaleByPixelRatio(input) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      const pixelRatio = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return Math.floor(input * pixelRatio);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    function hashCode(s) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      if (s.length === 0) return 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      let hash = 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        hash = (hash << 5) - hash + s.charCodeAt(i);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:        hash |= 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:      return hash;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/SplashCursor.tsx:    }

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:export default function ParticleBackground() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    let animationFrameId: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    let particles: Particle[] = [];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    class Particle {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      x: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      y: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      vx: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      vy: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      size: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      color: string;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      constructor(width: number, height: number) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.x = Math.random() * width;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.y = Math.random() * height;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        // 缓慢优雅的移动
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.size = Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        // 主题色：粉桔色与白色交织
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.color = Math.random() > 0.4 ? 'rgba(255, 180, 168, ' : 'rgba(226, 226, 226, '; 
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      update(width: number, height: number) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.x += this.vx;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        this.y += this.vy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.x < 0) this.vx *= -1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.x > width) this.vx *= -1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.y < 0) this.vy *= -1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        if (this.y > height) this.vy *= -1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      draw(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.beginPath();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.fillStyle = this.color + '0.7)';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        ctx.fill();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const init = () => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      // 在浏览器中获取当前容器的实际宽度，高度适配Hero的 1200px
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      canvas.height = 1200;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      particles = [];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      // 根据屏幕宽度自动调整粒子数量
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      const particleCount = Math.min(Math.floor(window.innerWidth / 12), 150);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        particles.push(new Particle(canvas.width, canvas.height));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const animate = () => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        particles[i].update(canvas.width, canvas.height);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        particles[i].draw(ctx);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        for (let j = i + 1; j < particles.length; j++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          const dx = particles[i].x - particles[j].x;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          const dy = particles[i].y - particles[j].y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          // 粒子靠得足够近时，绘制动态连线 (模拟工作流/神经网络)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          if (distance < 140) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.beginPath();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            const opacity = 0.25 - (distance / 560);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 180, 168, ${opacity > 0 ? opacity : 0})`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.moveTo(particles[i].x, particles[i].y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.lineTo(particles[j].x, particles[j].y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:            ctx.stroke();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:          }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    init();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    animate();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    const handleResize = () => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      init();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    return () => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  }, []);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  return (
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    <canvas
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      ref={canvasRef}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:      className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-[1200px] z-0 opacity-80 pointer-events-none"
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:    />
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ParticleBackground.tsx:  );

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:import { Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle } from 'ogl';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:import './Radar.css';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:function hexToVec3(hex: string) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  const h = hex.replace('#', '');
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  return [
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(0, 2), 16) / 255,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(2, 4), 16) / 255,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    parseInt(h.slice(4, 6), 16) / 255
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  ] as [number, number, number];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:const vertexShader = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:attribute vec2 uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:attribute vec2 position;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  vUv = uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 0, 1);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:const fragmentShader = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:precision highp float;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec3 uResolution;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uScale;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uRingCount;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSpokeCount;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uRingThickness;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSpokeThickness;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSweepSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSweepWidth;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uSweepLobes;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec3 uBgColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uFalloff;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uBrightness;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform vec2 uMouse;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform float uMouseInfluence;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:uniform bool uEnableMouse;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:#define TAU 6.28318530718
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:#define PI 3.14159265359
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  vec2 st = gl_FragCoord.xy / uResolution.xy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  st = st * 2.0 - 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  st.x *= uResolution.x / uResolution.y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  if (uEnableMouse) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    vec2 mShift = (uMouse * 2.0 - 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    mShift.x *= uResolution.x / uResolution.y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    st -= mShift * uMouseInfluence;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  st *= uScale;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float dist = length(st);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float theta = atan(st.y, st.x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float t = uTime * uSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float ringPhase = dist * uRingCount - t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float ringDist = abs(fract(ringPhase) - 0.5);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float ringGlow = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, uRingThickness, ringDist);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float spokeAngle = abs(fract(theta * uSpokeCount / TAU + 0.5) - 0.5) * TAU / uSpokeCount;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float arcDist = spokeAngle * dist;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float spokeGlow = (1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, uSpokeThickness, arcDist)) * smoothstep(0.0, 0.1, dist);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float sweepPhase = t * uSweepSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float sweepBeam = pow(max(0.5 * sin(uSweepLobes * theta + sweepPhase) + 0.5, 0.0), uSweepWidth);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float fade = smoothstep(1.05, 0.85, dist) * pow(max(1.0 - dist, 0.0), uFalloff);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float intensity = max((ringGlow + spokeGlow + sweepBeam) * fade * uBrightness, 0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  vec3 col = uColor * intensity + uBgColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  float alpha = clamp(length(col), 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(col, alpha);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:export default function Radar({
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  speed = 1.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  scale = 0.5,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  ringCount = 10.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  spokeCount = 10.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  ringThickness = 0.05,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  spokeThickness = 0.01,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepSpeed = 1.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepWidth = 2.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  sweepLobes = 1.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  color = '#9f29ff',
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  backgroundColor = '#000000',
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  falloff = 2.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  brightness = 1.0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  enableMouseInteraction = true,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  mouseInfluence = 0.1
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:}: {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  backgroundColor?: string,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  falloff?: number,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  brightness?: number,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  enableMouseInteraction?: boolean,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  mouseInfluence?: number
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:}) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    if (!containerRef.current) return;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    const container = containerRef.current;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    // Check if container already has a canvas (precaution)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    if (container.querySelector('canvas')) return;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    const renderer = new Renderer({ alpha: true, premultipliedAlpha: false });
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    const gl = renderer.gl;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    gl.clearColor(0, 0, 0, 0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    let program: Program;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    let currentMouse = [0.5, 0.5];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    let targetMouse = [0.5, 0.5];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    function handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      const rect = gl.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      targetMouse = [
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        1.0 - (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      ];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    function handleMouseLeave() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      targetMouse = [0.5, 0.5];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    function resize() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      renderer.setSize(container.offsetWidth, container.offsetHeight);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      if (program) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        program.uniforms.uResolution.value = [gl.canvas.width, gl.canvas.height, gl.canvas.width / gl.canvas.height];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    resize();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    const geometry = new Triangle(gl);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    program = new Program(gl, {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      vertex: vertexShader,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      fragment: fragmentShader,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      uniforms: {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uTime: { value: 0 },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uResolution: { value: [gl.canvas.width, gl.canvas.height, gl.canvas.width / gl.canvas.height] },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uSpeed: { value: speed },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uScale: { value: scale },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uRingCount: { value: ringCount },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uSpokeCount: { value: spokeCount },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uRingThickness: { value: ringThickness },

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uSweepLobes: { value: sweepLobes },

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uBgColor: { value: hexToVec3(backgroundColor) },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uFalloff: { value: falloff },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uBrightness: { value: brightness },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uMouse: { value: new Float32Array([0.5, 0.5]) },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uMouseInfluence: { value: mouseInfluence },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        uEnableMouse: { value: enableMouseInteraction }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    });
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    const mesh = new Mesh(gl, { geometry, program });
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    container.appendChild(gl.canvas);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    if (enableMouseInteraction) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      gl.canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      gl.canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    let animationFrameId: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    function update(time: number) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      program.uniforms.uTime.value = time * 0.001;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      if (enableMouseInteraction) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        currentMouse[0] += 0.05 * (targetMouse[0] - currentMouse[0]);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        currentMouse[1] += 0.05 * (targetMouse[1] - currentMouse[1]);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        program.uniforms.uMouse.value[0] = currentMouse[0];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        program.uniforms.uMouse.value[1] = currentMouse[1];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      } else {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        program.uniforms.uMouse.value[0] = 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        program.uniforms.uMouse.value[1] = 0.5;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      renderer.render({ scene: mesh });
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(update);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    return () => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('resize', resize);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      if (enableMouseInteraction) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        gl.canvas.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:        gl.canvas.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      container.removeChild(gl.canvas);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:      gl.getExtension('WEBGL_lose_context')?.loseContext();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:    };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  }, [speed, scale, ringCount, spokeCount, ringThickness, spokeThickness, sweepSpeed, sweepWidth, sweepLobes, color, backgroundColor, falloff, brightness, enableMouseInteraction, mouseInfluence]);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Radar.tsx:  return <div ref={containerRef} className="radar-container" />;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:import { Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle } from 'ogl';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:import './Grainient.css';

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:const hexToRgb = (hex: string) => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  return [parseInt(result[1], 16) / 255, parseInt(result[2], 16) / 255, parseInt(result[3], 16) / 255];

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec2 iResolution;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform float iTime;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:uniform vec3 uColor3;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:#define S(a,b,t) smoothstep(a,b,t)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:mat2 Rot(float a){float s=sin(a),c=cos(a);return mat2(c,-s,s,c);} 
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:vec2 hash(vec2 p){p=vec2(dot(p,vec2(2127.1,81.17)),dot(p,vec2(1269.5,283.37)));return fract(sin(p)*43758.5453);} 
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:float noise(vec2 p){vec2 i=floor(p),f=fract(p),u=f*f*(3.0-2.0*f);float n=mix(mix(dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(0.0,0.0)),f-vec2(0.0,0.0)),dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(1.0,0.0)),f-vec2(1.0,0.0)),u.x),mix(dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(0.0,1.0)),f-vec2(0.0,1.0)),dot(-1.0+2.0*hash(i+vec2(1.0,1.0)),f-vec2(1.0,1.0)),u.x),u.y);return 0.5+0.5*n;}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:void mainImage(out vec4 o, vec2 C){
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float t=iTime*uTimeSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec2 uv=C/iResolution.xy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float ratio=iResolution.x/iResolution.y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec2 tuv=uv-0.5+uCenterOffset;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv/=max(uZoom,0.001);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float degree=noise(vec2(t*0.1,tuv.x*tuv.y)*uNoiseScale);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.y*=1.0/ratio;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv*=Rot(radians((degree-0.5)*uRotationAmount+180.0));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.y*=ratio;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float frequency=uWarpFrequency;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float ws=max(uWarpStrength,0.001);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float amplitude=uWarpAmplitude/ws;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float warpTime=t*uWarpSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.x+=sin(tuv.y*frequency+warpTime)/amplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  tuv.y+=sin(tuv.x*(frequency*1.5)+warpTime)/(amplitude*0.5);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 colLav=uColor1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 colOrg=uColor2;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float s=max(uBlendSoftness,0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  mat2 blendRot=Rot(radians(uBlendAngle));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float blendX=(tuv*blendRot).x;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  float v1=-0.3-b-s;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec3 col=mix(layer1,layer2,S(v0,v1,tuv.y));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  vec2 grainUv=uv*max(uGrainScale,0.001);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Grainient.tsx:  if(uGrainAnimated>0.5){grainUv+=vec2(iTime*0.05);}

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:  function handleMouse(e) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    if (!ref.current) return;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const rect = ref.current.getBoundingClientRect();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const offsetX = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const offsetY = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const rotationX = (offsetY / (rect.height / 2)) * -rotateAmplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const rotationY = (offsetX / (rect.width / 2)) * rotateAmplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    rotateX.set(rotationX);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    rotateY.set(rotationY);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    x.set(e.clientX - rect.left);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    y.set(e.clientY - rect.top);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    const velocityY = offsetY - lastY;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    rotateFigcaption.set(-velocityY * 0.6);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:    setLastY(offsetY);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/TiltedCard.tsx:  }

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:import * as THREE from 'three';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:import './ColorBends.css';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:const MAX_COLORS = 8;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:const frag = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:#define MAX_COLORS ${MAX_COLORS}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec2 uCanvas;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec2 uRot;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform int uColorCount;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec3 uColors[MAX_COLORS];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform int uTransparent;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uScale;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uFrequency;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uWarpStrength;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform vec2 uPointer; // in NDC [-1,1]
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uMouseInfluence;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uParallax;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uNoise;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform int uIterations;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uIntensity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:uniform float uBandWidth;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  float t = uTime * uSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 p = vUv * 2.0 - 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  p += uPointer * uParallax * 0.1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 rp = vec2(p.x * uRot.x - p.y * uRot.y, p.x * uRot.y + p.y * uRot.x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 q = vec2(rp.x * (uCanvas.x / uCanvas.y), rp.y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q /= max(uScale, 0.0001);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q /= 0.5 + 0.2 * dot(q, q);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q += 0.2 * cos(t) - 7.56;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vec2 toward = (uPointer - rp);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  q += toward * uMouseInfluence * 0.2;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    for (int j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      if (j >= uIterations - 1) break;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      vec2 rr = sin(1.5 * (q.yx * uFrequency) + 2.0 * cos(q * uFrequency));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      q += (rr - q) * 0.15;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    vec3 col = vec3(0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    float a = 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    if (uColorCount > 0) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      vec2 s = q;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      vec3 sumCol = vec3(0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      float cover = 0.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      for (int i = 0; i < MAX_COLORS; ++i) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            if (i >= uColorCount) break;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            s -= 0.01;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 r = sin(1.5 * (s.yx * uFrequency) + 2.0 * cos(s * uFrequency));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m0 = length(r + sin(5.0 * r.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(i)) / 4.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kMix = pow(kBelow, 0.3); // strong response across 0..1
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float gain = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength - 1.0, 0.0); // allow >1 to amplify displacement
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 disp = (r - s) * kBelow;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 warped = s + disp * gain;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m1 = length(warped + sin(5.0 * warped.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(i)) / 4.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m = mix(m0, m1, kMix);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float w = 1.0 - exp(-uBandWidth / exp(uBandWidth * m));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            sumCol += uColors[i] * w;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            cover = max(cover, w);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      col = clamp(sumCol, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      a = uTransparent > 0 ? cover : 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    } else {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        vec2 s = q;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        for (int k = 0; k < 3; ++k) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            s -= 0.01;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 r = sin(1.5 * (s.yx * uFrequency) + 2.0 * cos(s * uFrequency));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m0 = length(r + sin(5.0 * r.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(k)) / 4.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kBelow = clamp(uWarpStrength, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float kMix = pow(kBelow, 0.3);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float gain = 1.0 + max(uWarpStrength - 1.0, 0.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 disp = (r - s) * kBelow;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            vec2 warped = s + disp * gain;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m1 = length(warped + sin(5.0 * warped.y * uFrequency - 3.0 * t + float(k)) / 4.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            float m = mix(m0, m1, kMix);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:            col[k] = 1.0 - exp(-uBandWidth / exp(uBandWidth * m));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:        a = uTransparent > 0 ? max(max(col.r, col.g), col.b) : 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    col *= uIntensity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    if (uNoise > 0.0001) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      float n = fract(sin(dot(gl_FragCoord.xy + vec2(uTime), vec2(12.9898, 78.233))) * 43758.5453123);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      col += (n - 0.5) * uNoise;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:      col = clamp(col, 0.0, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    vec3 rgb = (uTransparent > 0) ? col * a : col;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:    gl_FragColor = vec4(rgb, a);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:const vert = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  vUv = uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  gl_Position = vec4(position, 1.0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:export default function ColorBends({
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  className = '',
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  style = {},
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  rotation = 90,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  speed = 0.2,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  colors = [],
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  transparent = true,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  autoRotate = 0,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  scale = 1,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  frequency = 1,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  warpStrength = 1,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  mouseInfluence = 1,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  parallax = 0.5,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  noise = 0.15,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  iterations = 1,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  intensity = 1.5,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  bandWidth = 6
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:}: {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  className?: string;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  style?: any;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  rotation?: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  speed?: number;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ColorBends.tsx:  colors?: string[];

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:  const easeFunc = useCallback(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    t => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        case 'linear':
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        case 'ease-in':
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t * t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        case 'ease-in-out':
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        default:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:          return t * (2 - t);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:    },

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ClickSpark.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function parseHSL(hslStr: string) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const match = hslStr.match(/([\d.]+)\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*([\d.]+)%?/);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  if (!match) return { h: 40, s: 80, l: 80 };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  return { h: parseFloat(match[1]), s: parseFloat(match[2]), l: parseFloat(match[3]) };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function buildGlowVars(glowColor: string, intensity: number) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const { h, s, l } = parseHSL(glowColor);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const base = `${h}deg ${s}% ${l}%`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const opacities = [100, 60, 50, 40, 30, 20, 10];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const keys = ['', '-60', '-50', '-40', '-30', '-20', '-10'];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const vars: Record<string, string> = {};
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  for (let i = 0; i < opacities.length; i++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    vars[`--glow-color${keys[i]}`] = `hsl(${base} / ${Math.min(opacities[i] * intensity, 100)}%)`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  return vars;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function easeOutCubic(x: number) { return 1 - Math.pow(1 - x, 3); }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function easeInCubic(x: number) { return x * x * x; }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:function animateValue({ start = 0, end = 100, duration = 1000, delay = 0, ease = easeOutCubic, onUpdate, onEnd }: any) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const t0 = performance.now() + delay;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  function tick() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const elapsed = performance.now() - t0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const t = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    onUpdate(start + (end - start) * ease(t));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    else if (onEnd) onEnd();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  setTimeout(() => requestAnimationFrame(tick), delay);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:}

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const getCenterOfElement = useCallback((el: HTMLElement) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const { width, height } = el.getBoundingClientRect();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    return [width / 2, height / 2];
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, []);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const getEdgeProximity = useCallback((el: HTMLElement, x: number, y: number) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const [cx, cy] = getCenterOfElement(el);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dx = x - cx;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dy = y - cy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    let kx = Infinity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    let ky = Infinity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (dx !== 0) kx = cx / Math.abs(dx);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (dy !== 0) ky = cy / Math.abs(dy);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    return Math.min(Math.max(1 / Math.min(kx, ky), 0), 1);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, [getCenterOfElement]);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const getCursorAngle = useCallback((el: HTMLElement, x: number, y: number) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const [cx, cy] = getCenterOfElement(el);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dx = x - cx;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const dy = y - cy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) return 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    const radians = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    let degrees = radians * (180 / Math.PI) + 90;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (degrees < 0) degrees += 360;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    return degrees;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  }, [getCenterOfElement]);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  const handlePointerMove = useCallback((e: React.PointerEvent) => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:    if (!card) return;

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/BorderGlow.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:const hexToNormalizedRGB = (hex: string) => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:};
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:const vertexShader = `

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec3 vPosition;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:void main() {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  vUv = uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:const fragmentShader = `
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:varying vec3 vPosition;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform vec3  uColor;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uSpeed;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uScale;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uRotation;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:uniform float uNoiseIntensity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:const float e = 2.71828182845904523536;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:float noise(vec2 texCoord) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  float G = e;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec2  r = (G * sin(G * texCoord));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  return fract(r.x * r.y * (1.0 + texCoord.x));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:vec2 rotateUvs(vec2 uv, float angle) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  float c = cos(angle);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  float s = sin(angle);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  mat2  rot = mat2(c, -s, s, c);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  return rot * uv;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:void main() {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  float rnd        = noise(gl_FragCoord.xy);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec2  uv         = rotateUvs(vUv * uScale, uRotation);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec2  tex        = uv * uScale;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  float tOffset    = uSpeed * uTime;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  tex.y += 0.03 * sin(8.0 * tex.x - tOffset);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  float pattern = 0.6 +
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:                  0.4 * sin(5.0 * (tex.x + tex.y +
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:                                   cos(3.0 * tex.x + 5.0 * tex.y) +
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:                                   0.02 * tOffset) +
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:                           sin(20.0 * (tex.x + tex.y - 0.1 * tOffset)));
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  vec4 col = vec4(uColor, 1.0) * vec4(pattern) - rnd / 15.0 * uNoiseIntensity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  col.a = 1.0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  gl_FragColor = col;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:}
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:`;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:const SilkPlane = ({ uniforms }: { uniforms: any }) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  const ref = useRef<any>(null);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  const { viewport } = useThree();
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  useLayoutEffect(() => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/Silk.tsx:  useFrame((_, delta) => {

forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:import './ElectricBorder.css';
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:const ElectricBorder = ({
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  children,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  color = '#5227FF',
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  speed = 1,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  chaos = 0.12,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  borderRadius = 24,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  className,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  style
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:}: {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  children?: React.ReactNode,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  color?: string,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  speed?: number,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  chaos?: number,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  borderRadius?: number,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  className?: string,
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  style?: React.CSSProperties
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:}) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const animationRef = useRef<number>(0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const timeRef = useRef(0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const lastFrameTimeRef = useRef(0);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  // Noise functions
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const random = useCallback((x: number) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    return (Math.sin(x * 12.9898) * 43758.5453) % 1;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  }, []);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const noise2D = useCallback(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    (x: number, y: number) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const i = Math.floor(x);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const j = Math.floor(y);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const fx = x - i;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const fy = y - j;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const a = random(i + j * 57);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const b = random(i + 1 + j * 57);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const c = random(i + (j + 1) * 57);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const d = random(i + 1 + (j + 1) * 57);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const ux = fx * fx * (3.0 - 2.0 * fx);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      const uy = fy * fy * (3.0 - 2.0 * fy);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      return a * (1 - ux) * (1 - uy) + b * ux * (1 - uy) + c * (1 - ux) * uy + d * ux * uy;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    [random]
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  );
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const octavedNoise = useCallback(
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    (x: number, octaves: number, lacunarity: number, gain: number, baseAmplitude: number, baseFrequency: number, time: number, seed: number, baseFlatness: number) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let y = 0;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let amplitude = baseAmplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      let frequency = baseFrequency;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < octaves; i++) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        let octaveAmplitude = amplitude;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        if (i === 0) {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:          octaveAmplitude *= baseFlatness;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        y += octaveAmplitude * noise2D(frequency * x + seed * 100, time * frequency * 0.3);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        frequency *= lacunarity;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:        amplitude *= gain;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      }
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      return y;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    },
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    [noise2D]
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  );
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const getCornerPoint = useCallback((centerX: number, centerY: number, radius: number, startAngle: number, arcLength: number, progress: number) => {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    const angle = startAngle + progress * arcLength;
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    return {
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      x: centerX + radius * Math.cos(angle),
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:      y: centerY + radius * Math.sin(angle)
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:    };
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  }, []);
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:
forEach_v2.txt:src/components/ElectricBorder.tsx:  const getRoundedRectPoint = useCallback(
